input: rating 5.0. This is so perfect. It is my second one after wearing out ... This is so perfect. It is my second one after wearing out the first one. I rarely go to the chiropractor anymore. My son also has one. When my grandson was just a year old, he would go get the activator and bring it to his dad and point to his neck where it hurt. It can also be used on pets
rating 5.0. Flawless I've had for 4 months without a single problem. It's a great product for a fraction of the cost of the activator series

rating 5.0. works great! I bought this to treat my mule, but found me using it more and more on myself lol.

I can't make it to the chiropractor, to the masseuse etc on a regular basis with my life and work schedule. So a couple of these to the area works great.

To those that say this is a medical device and could cause permanent damage, you cannot damage yourself with this unless you ingest it.

This does not deliver a punch that would hurt someone. It merely acts on the small area you are needing relief of.

Even the chiro books say you can't do damage with this, even if you push as hard as you can, the punch it delivers is suppressed by the weight of your push.

I like it, use it and my coworkers (we are all medical) are using it too

rating 4.0. easy to use This little device helps me with days when I have pain in my neck. By making minor adjustments to the c1 and occiput, I am able to function better during the day with less pain, less drugs, and get better sleep. It is not the cure, but can help when you aren't able to meet with the chiropractor or are limited in visits due to cost.

rating 1.0. Way overpriced for what you get. Way too weak to manipulate any bones. Compared strength with my Chiropractors CAT and there is no comparison, he laughed when we compared them. For a $133.80, I would expect at least a decently made product but this is not the case here.

rating 5.0. This price was really affordable and patients are pleased with its use This is a quality chiropractic tool that is doing its job. Now we have a new tool to assure us that we will have the equipment that patients need.  For patients that cannot have a "hands on" adjustment, this tool is great.  Hope it lasts a long while. rating 5.0. i use it. it works. my chiropractor began to use this on my neck because i could no longer take the sudden jerks (sorry, few technical terms here) she used to deliver to it. she taught me how to use it, and how not to abuse it (don't use it every day!). i can honestly say that it has helped. a couple of vertebra in my neck are out of straight alignment, and can, at times, pop out more. if i use this when the condition worsens, a couple of shots, every other day; and, if i am mindful of my posture and do my gentle stretching, the pain and discomfort clears right up. i'm feeling my neck as i write this. 4 months ago, i was having a lot of pain and could feel the vertebra jutting out. i used the adjuster until i didn't feel the need to (you know when you need it, and it gives both a shot of temporary relief, and more long-lasting results). i'm noticing right now how much straighter the neck portion of my spine is, and how much more flexibility and mobility i have. BUT, do have someone show you how to use it. it's a serious tool, not a gimmick or toy.

rating 5.0. This was a fantastic purchase. My dog suffers from disc disease This was a fantastic purchase. My dog suffers from disc disease. His back will bother him from time to time. input: rating 5.0. Great stuff! Wow, I've been paying too much to have this done at the salon! I love this... no need to draw in eyebrows everyday. The color is very natural, and it's easy to use. I would recommend to anyone looking to darken their eyebrows.

rating 5.0. Definitely would recommend this product! I'm a blonde and it nicely dyed my eyebrows dark brown I read a lot of reviews before ordering a product so since I find them helpful I am hoping to help others with my review. I am not sure why anyone would not get good results with this product. I am a blonde so my eyebrows were barely noticeable. Almost 2 years ago I dyed my hair dark and love it but didn't like that my eyebrows didn't match. I have had my hairdresser dye them before but it never seemed to last. I decided to try this product thinking that if I had the product then I could dye them as often as needed. I did not find it messy like several other reviewers said. I did not need to wear gloves and it did not dye the skin out and around my eyebrows. If there was a lot of dye on my skin I wiped it off. The first time using it I took all the precautions based on what other reviewers said. I put Vaseline around my eyebrows and wore gloves but the second time I did neither. I initially left it on 2-3 minutes but when I washed my eyebrows after that amount of time I felt I needed more color so I immediately reapplied and left it on 4-5 minutes more. I did this maybe 3-4 times until I got the results I wanted. My eyebrows are not thick and they are thinner on the sides then in the middle so I did not scrub all the dye off of my skin underneath my eyebrows so they would look fuller. As days went by the dye would come off my skin but it didn't from my eyebrow hair and it still looked good. I touched up after 2 weeks but I really didn't have too because they still were pretty dark but since they were still dark it did make the process go faster the second time. I found the brush was the right size for the job and I have thin eyebrows. I will get at least 3 colorings out of one capsule and each time I reapplied several times with that 1/3 amount so one box will last a very long time.

rating 5.0. Love it!! I usually don't write reviews on amazon but this product is so worth it! I wish i had found it sooner. I struggle with very sparse, thin, never-grows-anymore brows due to overplucking. I always fill in my brows and it gets very annoying sometimes especially whenever i wake up early in the morning to go to work. It does fade but you can still tell you have brows. This stuff works so well i hope it doesn't get discontinued! The tint lasts about a week for me, i wish it lasted longer. But that will not make me deduct a star because it looks so natural on me and i dont look "naked" anymore. Now i can go swimming without my brows coming off! 5 stars!!!

rating 5.0. this worked great. I did quite a bit of research this worked great. I did quite a bit of research, so I'll write exactly what I did below.

Before anything I washed my eyebrows with some makeup remover to ensure no gross dirt or oils were left over.

I opened the capsule over the given dish and that was in the sink to make sure nothing made a mess. I added the developer and then mixed it togtwhe and then applied it to my right eyebrow ***VERY IMPORTANT***** apply it one EYEBROW AT A TIME. Meaning apply to one eyebrow, wait, remove and then go to the next.

I followed the instructions for dark brown and let it sit and develop for 1-2 minutes. Going a few seconds over isn't gonna hurt anything. The longer it stays on it darker it gets though so keep that in mind.

After the timer went off I removed it first with a dry cotton ball and then a wet one. Then I did my other brow and washed my face to make sure there was no other cream on my eyebrows left over.

rating 3.0. Some Issues I returned the 1st box which was used & had fingerprint smudges on the developer bottle. The 2nd box was fine.

Do an allergy test if you have sensitive skin. My mom did the test on her arm and woke up with the area red & puffy.

But ultimately I like this tint kit. It works well on my eyebrows. I used the method of putting on a layer, wiping it off after 30 seconds, checking, then adding another layer until I was happy with the results.

The tint lasts about 10 days, more if you apply it darker at first. If you are applying for event, do so maybe 3 days before so the color can fade a little.

rating 5.0. Very satisfied. Because of the consistency after mixing it was ... Very satisfied. Because of the consistency after mixing it was much easier to apply than I had expected. Also, it is a great buy: I was expecting this to be a one-time use product, but with 20 capsules (which means 20 applications) and a large bottle of the cream to mix them in -- I expect this product to last about a year and a half or more. Easy to use, great color, exceptional buy!
Sandra H.

rating 1.0. Never works One night, I've tried it 4 times which made the skin under my brows irritating for over a week, but it did not tint the skin at all. I've tried a few more times after that, but never worked.

rating 5.0. Works good for filling in sparse eyebrows I was hoping that this product would be like the tattoo eyebrow products that last for a few days after applying (from reading the reviews). The skin dying fades after about one day. It is also hard to create a nice eyebrow shape with this product. The dye is a light creamy brown when mixed so you can't really see where the product is on the skin when you apply it. So when I finished dying, my eyebrows were super thick, uneven and ugly. I'm glad that the skin dying faded in a day, I wouldn't want to walk out in public like that. It's useful in that it dyes my thin baby eyebrow hairs. I have sparse eyebrows and they are slowly growing back. The dye helps bring out colour in the baby hairs. So it does what it's supposed to do, which is dye hair, but it doesn't work like a tattoo eyebrow product as some reviewers have suggested, not for me anyways.

Edit: I've gotten better at applying this on my eyebrows, I use small, slow strokes to get the product on.This helps with precision. I've used it maybe 5 or 6 times and I've barely used one capsule, you don't need much. This kit will last me a very very long time! Also, I've been leaving it on longer, so it lasts maybe 3 or 4 days. Glad I discovered this product!

rating 5.0. Looks very natural and very easy to use Looks very natural and very easy to use. I recommend building the color up slowly by reapplying it a couple of times in short periods of time vs leaving it on for a long time. I mix the batch and complete one brow at a time for best color control. I apply the tint to one brow, leave it on for 1 minute. Wipe it off and adjust the tint where more color is needed. After the first minute, the second and third applications are only left on for 30seconds each time. Make sure you have a wet paper towel and clean q-tips near by to help clean up any mess quickly.

rating 5.0. Great tint for eyebrows Wow is this easy to use! I left on my brows one minute for starters and ended up with 1.5 minutes working best. So fast and easy to tint. It's been two weeks, and I haven't noticed any fading.  I had to contact the company as the Amazon distributor left out the developer. They sent me a replacement bottle very quickly and were very pleasant to talk to. I'd highly recommend this product.
rating 4.0. highly recommend it! You save so much money doing it ... I will definitely buy it again after I finish using this. highly recommend it! You save so much money doing it yourself.
rating 1.0. I'm not happy with this I'm not happy with this. I didn't receive all the capsules that were supposed to come with it and it's really hard to get off the skin so be careful when using.
rating 5.0. Five Stars I love it .... this tint kit really work.

rating 5.0. Five Stars I love this kit!!!! It arrived four days earlier than it was supposed to which was amazing because I've been dreaming about permanent eyebrows since I ordered it two days ago. It was simple to use and thanks to all the reviews on YouTube I knew what expect with the little powder capsules. The color of the powder when mixed isn't what you would think. It looked really light so I kept checking the labels to make sure I had the right stuff. Lol I did. Super easy to apply because I've been drawing on my eyebrows for years now. It tingled and burned a little only because I waxed, trimmed, shaped, and plucked my eyebrows today right before the kit arrived. The kit tells not to do that right before applying but it was too late and needed to be done.  So that was on me I could've waited a day or two and taken a nap instead.  Disregard my face in the pictures....I'm battling the flu so actually managing to do my eyebrows was a battle and a half. But I need eyebrows to go outside. A lot of reviews on here say that it only lasted a week or less. For anybody who does their brows everyday knows the fear of losing them to hug, make out session, or an itch. A week of no worrying is better than stressing about kids touching your face or your hat riding too low.

rating 5.0. Pretty swell product. This stuff works but be careful bc it definitely stained my skin. Used nail polish remover to get most of it off. I also left on for ten minutes so it turned out extra dark.

rating 5.0. Awesome product! Works quickly and works well Awesome product! Works quickly and works well. My brows grow unevenly and sparce so it can only help so much, but the amount of time spent doing my brows as my daily makeup has drastically decreased thanks to this product!

rating 4.0. So far so good The product is easy to use. Unless you're very careful you'll need gloves, it really stains. I left it on my brows for 2 minutes then for 1 minute more. It gets a little darker after you wipe it off.
The capsule is not easy to open. I needed to cut it open with scissors. The amount per capsule is a lot more than necessary for one use, so if you have a way to save the powder you can make one kit last a very long time.
So far I didn't have any allergic reaction to the product. I'll update if I develop any.
Overall I'm happy with the color, let's see if it will last long. Now I just need to master the art of filling my eyebrows properly for a better shape :-)

rating 5.0. Colors quickly & completely This dye is great!!  It works in about 3-4 minutes and lasts for about 6 weeks and I use the dark brown color. The application brush is awesome and makes applying the dye really easy.  My hair dresser recommended this and I have not been disappointed!

rating 5.0. Salon eyebrow-tinting is now a thing of the past I have brown hair but was born with naturally light and sparse eyebrows. I used to spend obscene amounts of money getting my brows done for up to $20 at the salon (oftentimes they didn't get it as dark as I wanted), but since purchasing this product I haven't been back! Since I know how I like my brows better than any esthetician would, I apply the dye as I would fill in my brows with a pencil or eyeshadow. I let the dye sit for about 2-3 minutes, then wipe it off with a rag (caution: the dye DOES stain rags!). The dye is inevitably on my skin for a day or 2, but since I fill in only where I'd actually put makeup, it's like I have makeup on and they actually look fuller (just use caution when applying). The box comes with at least 20 or so capsules of dye (which are the hardest to open without getting powder in my sink), so that means I can literally dye my brows 20 different times. The dye lasts about 2 weeks at a time. Overall, if you have lightly-colored eyebrows and want them to be darker, I highly recommend this. It's saved me time, money, and hassle!

I attached 2 photos to this review: Picture #1 is my natural brows, before dying, and picture #2 is shortly after dying, with my brows brushed upwards with some drugstore brow gel. The first is taken with my iPhone and 2nd picture with my Canon DSLR, but the sparsity of my natural eyebrows should definitely be apparent in the first photo despite the lower-quality.

rating 4.0. Treat this like tattooing! Be careful with application. Awesome product but DO NOT GET ANYWHERE THAT YOU DON'T WANT COLOR. It's an awesome product otherwise, just make sure your lines are perfect and you only apply this where you want color!

rating 5.0. Save time with Semi-Permanent Eyebrows I don't know why I just found out about this now. I've been pencil shading in my eyebrows everyday for 22 years. This product is amazing! My eyebrows are what I spend the most time on when I'm doing my makeup so when I saw this, I had to try it for myself. One capsule is a lot of powder so I only use 1/3 of it w/ an equal amount of developer for both eyebrows. The package comes with a eyebrow brush and the application is easy. If you accidentally get the tint on the outside of your brows, just quickly wipe it off with a damp q-tip. I suggest going on YouTube to get some tips on how to apply it before actually putting it on yourself. I definitely recommend this product. It's pretty awesome! :-)

current_product_reviews: rating 4.0. Really Good, would be 5 stars if it lasted longer. This tint is really good. I have on a scale from very fair to very dark, I have dark skin so In order to get this tint as dark as I need to I need to leave it on 20 minutes believe it or not. The suggestion and directions say 5-6 minutes for darker, but most of it wipes off. If you want darker brows youre going to have to throw out the directions and wipe and reapply to your liking. I also have very sparse brows, however my sister does not and I found it required less time to get her brows darker too. like 10-14 minutes. I think it takes me longer because I shape the tint like I would "drawing on" my brows so Its dying my skin at one point. The tint begins to wear off after 3 days (this is with me avoiding washing my brows or applying moisturizers) and I would say by day 5 it's almost completely gone. So if you like the look you will have to maintain it. 4 stars because I wish it would last longer.

input: rating 5.0. best ever! this is the BEST remover I have EVER found and used. It gets the eye makeup off without leaving any residue. rating 3.0. "Light" describes the degree of cleansing, not the oil texture... I have used other oils to oil cleanse in the past, but I wanted one that had an emulsifying agent to help the oil rinse off cleanly. This oil seemed like a good place to start, since Neutrogena has a good reputation and this was a very affordable choice.

It does a good job of removing my (lightly applied) foundation, but when it comes to liquid lipcolor, mascara, and eyeliner, this stuff just doesn't really work. It feels nice, and the emulsification is really cool. Unfortunately it's not so great as a cleanser. So now I'm back to oil cleansing with a different oil, and using one pump of this to get all the oil off.

rating 4.0. Doesn't break me out I am really enjoying this oil. I tried it a few years ago and didn't care for it, but now I'm getting into oil cleansing again so I gave it another go. It really is ultra-light. It leaves my face feeling clean without making it feel super dry. Also, the smell is light and pleasant.
I have insanely sensitive and acne prone skin, so the idea of putting oil on my face is terrifying, but this doesn't break me out.
Knocked off a star because it doesn't do the best at removing eye makeup. I don't really like having to scrub my eyes with this stuff just to get off my eyeliner. However, it does not irritate my eyes, so that's a plus.
Overall, I think this is a good, affordable drugstore oil cleanser.

rating 5.0. Wonderfully light and silky, does a good job, smells wonderful too! I have used more expensive facial cleansing oils and not been nearly as happy with them as I am with this product.  First, it is much silkier and lighter than other oils I have used, so that it is much easier to use, absorbs better, and doesn't leave oily spots on my vanity.  One of the nicest things about it is the pleasant smell; smells a little bit like apples.  The other oils I have used did not have a pleasant smell at all; smelled like cooking oil.  And on top of all that, the price on this oil is significantly less expensive than what I was using. Why would I ever go back to paying more when I can buy this oil for less and be much happier with it?  Can't recommend it highly enough.  Just fyi; I am in my fifties, have dry skin, always looking for anti-aging and moisturizing products, but even someone with younger skin would be happy since the oil is so light.

rating 5.0. Tried and True Love this oil cleanser. I use it as part of my double cleansing routine (10 step Korean skincare) at night. Smells so good. My face always feels clean and soft after. This is definitely a staple for me and the subscription makes it so I never run out and the savings are a plus.

rating 5.0. Highly effective, clean rinsing, no other cleanser needed to follow up I used to use the makeup remover cloths to take off makeup, but now I use this. In my own tests, I can use cloth, then this oil. Following with a fresh cloth, and I'm taking off a ton more makeup. Same happens with other cleansers. If I use this oil first, nothing comes off afterwards. In other words, the oil removes makeup more effectively & completely than other methods.

I have very oily, acne-prone skin, and this is the only oil-based product I have ever been able to consistently use. I've probably gone through 2 dozen bottles over a 2-year or longer timeframe, and I have not experienced any breakouts from using it.

I wear waterproof mascara, eyeliner, and concealer every day, plus I use multiple layers of setting spray - in addition to a full face of non-waterproof cosmetics. Neutrogena Ultra Light Cleansing Oil cuts through absolutely all of it with just a couple of pumps and a single application.

My method of use with very oily skin: apply to dry face, massaging in, even down my neck. Spend time massaging into eyelash line to make sure mascara & eyeliner are completely broken down. Rinse hands off with warm water (no soap needed to remove!). Use a Neutrogena makeup remover cloth to remove majority of broken down makeup and cleansing oil. Follow with acne wash (not necessary if this is not part of your acne-prevention regimen). If you have normal to dry skin, rinsing face with warm water is all you'll need to do. Soaps & cleansers are totally unneeded to remove the oil.

Does not burn my eyes (blurs vision because it's oil, duh), does not make existing breakouts worse. Used daily, my breakouts actually heal faster. Middle-aged skin, so I used to get the occasional dry spot (despite the natural oiliness...hormones are a b*tch), and that has stopped, as well.

rating 5.0. My skin loves this! I used to buy this product all the time, have used it for years. I grew up only using alcohol based cleaners and thought that the more "tight" my face felt or the more my face "burned" while cleaning it the better.  Only after I was well into my 30's did I learn the benefits of cleaning your face with oil.  I used to have mild acne issues, very dry skin, especially during the winters...not since switching to an oil based cleaner. rating 5.0. Fantastic Find I read about these cloths on Makeupalley where they are nearly universally praised. After reading the reviews there, I bought one on eBay about a year ago. Before using the Salux cloth, I typically used poofs or one of those scrubby washcloths that are sold at Wal-Mart. Neither can compare to these cloths!

The first time I used this cloth, it felt a bit harsh because I wasn't quite used to it. After the second day, my skin had adjusted and I've since never felt even slightly uncomfortable when using it. It is tough enjoy to really get read of the dead skin on your body without feeling like you're washing with a piece of sandpaper. It works beautifully with just about every cleanser or soap you use. Unlike some cloths, you don't have to use a huge amount of product to get a good lather. They're also long enough to use when washing your back which eliminates the need for a back brush. These cloths also last forever and a day. The one I bought last year was still in good condition but I was forced to buy another one after my cat decided to steal it out of my shower and use it as a toy. You can typically find a pack of three for under $10 on various sites and, if you're lucky, you can find them at Japanese stores for $1 or two.

Overall, these cloths are a fantastic find as they are long lasting and reasonably priced.

rating 5.0. Perfect for keratosis pilaris and other bumps! ***UPDATE Feb. 2021***
I still continue to use these exclusively. I absolutely love them. One time, I bought the single, gray towel that is marketed as being more exfoliating, but I didn't notice a difference. Don't bother - just buy the 3-pack and enjoy!

These are fantastic.
I bought them for dry brushing purposes- I've been dry brushing to help with both circulation (I have cellulite, and since I started dry brushing last year I noticed a *slight* improvement, which is better than nothing) and the keratosis pilaris on my upper arms. I love dry brushing, it feels great, but there were quite a few days when I missed it and would get in the shower to use a soft washcloth.

Now these babies...on the days when I don't dry brush before taking a shower, I use these intensively in the areas I would while dry brushing. My kp is gone from my arms (and butt!) and I have smooth skin. Before these I had dry, sensitive skin and now my arms still feel smooth even when I don't moisturize. I was worried about using this on sensitive areas like my neck and chest, but I just use a lighter hand in those areas and still get great results (never tried it on my face).

For those with kp, I'm throwing out another product recommendation: Mario Badescu AHA Botanical Body Wash. Using that, with these towels, has rid me of kp.

Finally, these were essential to help me with a botched (user-error) self-tan job. I'll be buying these as long as they'll manufacture them!

rating 3.0. Works very well but smells terrible There are three "towels" in the package, as shown in the picture. A couple of things to note: (1) It's a long, flat loofah. 11 x 35 inches. To put that into perspective, imagine a long winter scarf, but in loofah-style material. (2) It's not a towel and has no drying properties. (3) All three items in the package have the same degree of coarseness (the different colors are not an indication of varying coarseness).

The pros: It's extremely easy to use, especially for hard-to-reach areas on the back. It's more coarse than the loofah poufs that are commonly sold in drugstores, but not so coarse that it's uncomfortable. You can vary the sensation of coarseness by varying the pressure used when washing. It holds suds very well while you're using it.

The cons: It has an awful chemical smell and no amount of use has made the smell go away (washing it in the washer didn't help, either). It's impractical to store. With loofah poufs, you can hang them on a hook or rest them on the edge of the tub or counter. Not so with these. They have to be draped over a towel rack or shower rod/door. And they're not particularly attractive so I fold and put mine away once it has dried...which limits its use.

Still, I really like it and if it weren't for the chemical smell, it would get four stars.

rating 5.0. How am I just now discovering these?! I started looking into exfoliating cloths/towels when I decided to start using a sunless tanner and needed to do some extreme exfoliating. I ordered this product after reading all of the rave reviews and to be quite honest, I didn't expect much from them, but I am amazed! I'm lucky not to have any acne on my face but I do have quite a bit all over my back. After a couple weeks of usage, my back is looking so much better! I just feel so clean and fresh every single time I use it and I cannot see myself not using one in the future. I'm only mad that I'm just now discovering them!

By the way, they do take some getting used to and may feel a bit rough at first, but believe me, your skin will thank you!

rating 5.0. Very nice! I received 3 authentic Salux bath sheets (wash cloth just doesn't sound right). The package says made in Japan and the tag on the cloth says made in japan. I love these thing! They take a little soap a long LONG way and dry very quickly. They can be machine washed but should be hung to dry.

For those who have not heard of these, they are not a terry towel wash cloth. They are very long (in length) exfoliating cloths made from nylon and polyester. They are a lot tougher than the ones you will find at a dollar store/ beauty supply store and last a lot longer. Also they can be very rough when you first use one, in short, it feels like a good back scratching. I don't recommend using it on you face or privets as it can be too rough.

rating 5.0. First scraper was defective. the second is very good Update after returning the defective scraper and purchasing another (identical) one:
At first glance and after first try the scraper looks good and it is adequate to the job. Enclosed instruction for use is written well and wording is clear. The guard covers the sharp blade well while storing the scraper. Finally, I am completely satisfied with this product. In addition, the manufacturer (Werxrite) cares about its reputation and tries to resolve the issues with their product (see, for example, manufacturer comments to my original review below). This is a huge plus nowadays when the market is flooded in by low quality products. My original review below was caused by two reasons: 1. Instruction card was not enclosed in the package. 2. The blade guard cannot stay (defect) in the closed position. Because of all these reasons, please, disregard my original review below.

Update after reading two manufacturer comments for my review may be found in my comment below. Reasons for my review below are explained in my comment. I will update this review later as explained in my comment. For now, please, disregard my review.

Original review:
Multiple scraper pictures don't show very thin (about 1mm wide) plastic elastic rope that is stretched between the black and red buttons on the pictures of the gray scraper. The red button is attached to the red plastic guard (see it on top of the picture) of the blade, and the black button is attached to the body of the scraper. When you push the red button with your thumb down, the red blade guard moves also down stretching the unshown plastic rope and blade gets naked (working position). When you release the red button, the stretched elastic plastic rope shrinks and pushes the guard up hiding the blade. This plastic rope is so thin that it broke at first use. Second, the red button has to be kept down by the thumb while operating the scraper otherwise the guard immediately moves up hiding the blade. This makes this scraper very awkward to use.

input:
rating 5.0. NOT A FROST!! TRUE MIRROR!! I have had these long enough to test all three colors. I'm satisfied these are clearly NOT frost. If you apply correctly, the mirror effect is better than the powders. However, the gold is more of a gold/green, not a true gold. The silver & rose gold are beautiful.

To apply correctly and have the mirror effect, you must adhere to nail tech guidelines!!

1. Wash & scrub your nails with a nail brush.

2. Dry your nails!

3. Apply a base coat. This is VERY important to have a filled in base on your nails. I use Mia's.

4. Apply one thin coat to each nail.

5. Use a nail corrector pen or small brush dipped in acetone to remove any on cuticles.

6. Go back to first nail painted and apply a second, thicker coat. Repeat on other nails.

7. Repeat step 5.

8. Apply your choice of top coat. I use Mia's in my salon.

If you can't get the same results, you're either not putting a base and top coat on or you're using too much on your first coat. Enjoy!!

So... i was on the hunt for a baby powder scent (odd for a 50+ year old dude, I know, but for some reason, most colognes and most other scents start to not smell good to my nose after a while, don't know why). But for some reason, my nose never gets 'annoyed' with baby powder scent, so I was looking for a cologne or oil or something with that scent. Found and purchased a BUNCH of oils from many different merchants here on Amazon, and THIS one HERE was HANDS DOWN my favorite. the aroma is JUST right, and it lasts appropriately long. (Some of the others didn't quite hit the mark...some initially smelled 'ok', but after a while they started to have that 'annoying cologne' smell that I mentioned above.) Meeteasy Electrical Sonic Dental Calculus Plaque Remover was surprisingly easy to use and effective My dentist said there was really nothing I could do to remove my teeth stains (which reappear about a month after each dental cleaning) albeit I don't drink coffee or tea really.  I tried to follow his daily mouth rinsing, brushing and flossing guidelines, but the stains and plaque/tartar still appear.  My dentist said the only other way to remove the stains and tarter was another dental teeth cleaning with him.  Tried the Meeteasy Electrical Sonic Dental Calculus Plaque Remover and was pleasantly surprised by the ease of use and clean results.  For a few tough tartar buildups, still need to gently use the metal dental pick which is also provided.  But all-in-all, my teeth look and feel pretty clean.  Definitely a useful and effective product.

rating 4.0. Helps w/severe dental calculus So I saw a family member of mines teeth were so bad it literally scared me for them. They had so much dental calculus you almost couldn’t see the tooth/teeth anymore. It was just enveloping the teeth so much.
So I quickly went online in search of solutions for at home for dental calculus and found this and ordered it for same day delivery. I went to work as soon as it came.

At first I wasn’t getting anything & didn’t think it was going to work. But then I was SHOCKED with seeing it work. It’s kind of scary at first seeing chunks and pieces just chip and come off and hearing them break off. So if you have dental calculus this bad too be prepared for that mentally but if yours is that bad too it’s best to have someone help you cause you can’t really see it yourself.

I worked on their teeth for over and hour and was able to get probably 80-85% off which I wasn’t expecting at all. I mean I was hoping but it was something I’d never done before and never used this product either so I didn’t know what to expect but I was seriously able to get most of it off in a little over an hour.

One thing I will say about the device is for some reason it will randomly turn off (and no I’m not talking about the auto shut off after 5mins) it really does just turn off it seems when it thinks it’s stuck or something. It’s annoying but not too bad but I thought I’d mention it.

I also used the manual tools it came with too to try and get more control for picking the calculus off in sensitive spots and they worked too :) I found them useful for going in between teeth.

So far I’m REALLY glad I bought this. Worth the try if you’re struggling with SEVERE dental calculus because it does work.

Their thoughts on it’s performance is now their teeth feel rough but that’s because it’s not been perfectly scraped and not finished being cleaned so there’s now rough calculus instead of a “smooth surface” of HUGE dental calculus deposits.

I also bought a special toothpaste to pair with it that softens plaque so hopefully that will help too.

Good luck and I hope this was helpful :)

They didn’t want to share pictures but hopefully my description was helpful.

rating 5.0. Amazing false eyelashes I bought a small pack of these first to see if I liked the product (style, feel, look, etc.), they were my first go at false eyelashes and I absolutely fell in love with them immediately. From the moment I opened them I knew I'd love them. Demi wispies have that night length at the edge of my eyes, but are shorter toward the inner part of my eye...making them look dramatic and gorgeous. I adhere them using Duo white to clear glue (the blue package) and a tool I bought from Target. Once they're on they can be a little long for my eyes, so I just trim them a tiny bit (so they don't hit my sunglass lenses) and then apply the rest of my make up (to cover up any glue mishaps I probably had).

Shipping was quick, the product is great, and since I loved the small I pack.. I bought this 20 pair pack which does come with 40 single lashes/20 pairs total. All the same eye lash style. I absolutely LOVE them. I will be repurchasing this product for sure.

I'm 100% a normal customer by the way, I wasn't paid or anything to give this review. Just super happy with the product!

input: rating 5.0. easy to use, great results I have natural dark black hair but my brows were always on the more grayish side and this kit (in shade dark brown) has done wonders! The kit comes with everything you need (powder, developer, brush, and even a small container to hold the dye!). I use concealer to shape my brows before to ensure that the dye doesn't end up where it shouldn't then I apply a heavy layer and leave it one for 7-10 mins. I also only use about 1/2 the powder in the capsule because a whole capsule is too much for one pair of eyebrows. I've noticed that being avoiding using foaming face washes on your dyed brows helps the color last longer! I redo this every 2 weeks or so (the attach pic is of 2 week old brows and you can see that the color has faded some). Much more affordable and less commitment than microblading and I get constantly compliments on my 'natural' brows

rating 5.0. Get this. Now. I’m am very pleasantly surprised!!  This was very easy to use, and I love that it comes in individual packages for multiple uses. And it comes with a nice brush too! rating 5.0. this worked great. I did quite a bit of research this worked great. I did quite a bit of research, so I'll write exactly what I did below.

Before anything I washed my eyebrows with some makeup remover to ensure no gross dirt or oils were left over.

I opened the capsule over the given dish and that was in the sink to make sure nothing made a mess. I added the developer and then mixed it togtwhe and then applied it to my right eyebrow ***VERY IMPORTANT***** apply it one EYEBROW AT A TIME. Meaning apply to one eyebrow, wait, remove and then go to the next.

I followed the instructions for dark brown and let it sit and develop for 1-2 minutes. Going a few seconds over isn't gonna hurt anything. The longer it stays on it darker it gets though so keep that in mind.

After the timer went off I removed it first with a dry cotton ball and then a wet one. Then I did my other brow and washed my face to make sure there was no other cream on my eyebrows left over.

rating 5.0. A Must Have I purchased this product because getting my eyebrows tinted at the salon was costing me $12 every two weeks.  When you add in the $8 for wax, that is $20 every two weeks...or $40 per month or $480 per year.  Way too much to be spending on my eyebrows.  Due to the good reviews, I purchased this product.  It comes with EVERYTHING you need including an application brush.  Its about 30 capsules, and 1 capsule makes plenty.  FOLLOW the directions! I was watching YouTube and the women left theirs on for like 10 minutes...even the lady at the Salon did the same thing...maybe that's because she used a lighter tint...I am not sure...but the directions are clear and concise.  I followed them and I LOVED the results.  I was so afraid of breaking out in an allergic reaction, I was putting everything over my eyebrows at that point.  Its day 4 and its still there.  Using Vaseline around the brows and qtips to help wipe away the access tint was the best advice I received on YouTube.  I will continue to use this product...would definitely recommend!

rating 5.0. Salon eyebrow-tinting is now a thing of the past I have brown hair but was born with naturally light and sparse eyebrows. I used to spend obscene amounts of money getting my brows done for up to $20 at the salon (oftentimes they didn't get it as dark as I wanted), but since purchasing this product I haven't been back! Since I know how I like my brows better than any esthetician would, I apply the dye as I would fill in my brows with a pencil or eyeshadow. I let the dye sit for about 2-3 minutes, then wipe it off with a rag (caution: the dye DOES stain rags!). The dye is inevitably on my skin for a day or 2, but since I fill in only where I'd actually put makeup, it's like I have makeup on and they actually look fuller (just use caution when applying). The box comes with at least 20 or so capsules of dye (which are the hardest to open without getting powder in my sink), so that means I can literally dye my brows 20 different times. The dye lasts about 2 weeks at a time. Overall, if you have lightly-colored eyebrows and want them to be darker, I highly recommend this. It's saved me time, money, and hassle!

I attached 2 photos to this review: Picture #1 is my natural brows, before dying, and picture #2 is shortly after dying, with my brows brushed upwards with some drugstore brow gel. The first is taken with my iPhone and 2nd picture with my Canon DSLR, but the sparsity of my natural eyebrows should definitely be apparent in the first photo despite the lower-quality.

rating 5.0. Very natural looking. I was so excited to see this offered in a larger pack. Usually I buy the small 4 application packs and this one seems to be easier to use too. Not sure if it's a different formula , but I love it. It doesn't stain your skin as bad. I love it.

rating 3.0. Some Issues I returned the 1st box which was used & had fingerprint smudges on the developer bottle. The 2nd box was fine.

Do an allergy test if you have sensitive skin. My mom did the test on her arm and woke up with the area red & puffy.

But ultimately I like this tint kit. It works well on my eyebrows. I used the method of putting on a layer, wiping it off after 30 seconds, checking, then adding another layer until I was happy with the results.

The tint lasts about 10 days, more if you apply it darker at first. If you are applying for event, do so maybe 3 days before so the color can fade a little.

rating 1.0. Not for sensitive skin Bought this for my husband because he has very sensitive skin when he colors his beard but this product was worse than what you can buy at the pharmacy. So if you have sensitive skin avoid this product!

rating 5.0. Excellent results I had great results but I didn't follow the directions exactly. I used the included brush to paint some Vaseline around my eyebrow (outlining it but not touching the hair). This keeps the dye from staining your skin outside your eyebrow. Then I used a mascara wand (the disposable kind you can get as samples) to apply the dye. This let me brush the dye through the eyebrow hairs rather than slather it onto my skin.

I left it on for 4-5 minutes and got a perfect shade of dark brown (not quite black). If it stained the skin under my eyebrow, it isn't noticeable. The whole process took under 10 minutes. The capsules have powder dye, so I was able to cut it open and only use half.

rating 5.0. Nice dark color I just tried this product this morning, so I can’t review how long the color last. If I remember, I will come back and update once it fades away.

I colored my eyebrows and eyelashes. I used mascara wands I had on hand from Ulta’s Christmas sale and gently brushed the product into my brows and lashes.

I applied aquaphor around my eyes with a qtip to prevent staining my skin. Then I applied the dye to my right eyelashes and let it sit for 5 min. I rinsed it out and evaluated the color. I had apparently gotten a touch of aquaphor on my lashes and had a blond spot. I washed my lashes, reapplied the aquaphor, and reapplied the dye. This time I let it sit for 7 min. Washed it off and it looks great my lashes are a nice dark even color. I then moved on to the next eye and did the exact same process. I let it set 5 min., rinsed to check the color and reapplied for another 7 min.

I then moved on to my brows. I brushed the dye into my right brow being careful not to get any on my skin. I did get a few spots and I wiped them off as soon as I could. They didn’t stain my skin at all. I was unsure how long to leave it on to get the desired color so I let it sit 7 min., rinsed and reapplied for another 7 min. I then rinsed and then just did spot touch-ups to make it even. I followed the same process for my left eyebrow. I love the results.

I have attached pictures of my eyebrows with one done and one undone and the wands I used to apply the product.

I would recommend this to a friend.

I just caution you when it comes to expectations for tinted eyelashes. It only colors lashes. It does not thicken the width of the lash hair like mascara does. No tinting product does that.

I hope this review is helpful!

rating 5.0. Awesome The dark brown is VERY dark, almost black. Medium brown would probably match my hair better, but I like my brows dark so I'm okay with it. I LOVE the product. I try to do it on a Friday when I know I'm off for the weekend and no one will see any stains I may have. I will definitely continue to buy this product, I love it. I did try it on my brows, despite the info on the package, but was dissatisfied with the results.  The capsule was difficult to open.  It was hard to gauge how much developer to add. rating 5.0. Gave me the perfect look! This worked very well. I was a bit worried about how dark it would come out but it looks nice. I have naturally sparse eyebrows and I'm trying to grow them out, but it seems that they are lengthening more than thickening, this was the perfect solutIon. It looks very natural, the only make up I ever put on is for my eyebrows so I can skip that step. Doesnt look dramatic like I need a full face of makeup to go with it...

I recommend not only having clean skin but also exfoliate beforehand! Maybe not right before because it'll sting (I did), but the day before. That way the tint isn't attaching to dry dead skin and will stick Better.

I used a whole capsule, but it definitely was not needed. Half or even a third would work. If you want it to look really natural, so the front of your eyebrows last, I let everything process for a couple of minutes, applying to both, Then did the front and went another two minutes, total processing time was around five minutes. I dont like gloves so my fingers did get stained, so wear them if you have somewhere to go the same day or a fresh mani

I'm writing this right after doing it, so I don't know about longevity, but even if you had to retouch every week, they give you enough capsules to last for almost at year, at minimum 6 months.

rating 4.0. Worked well to quickly alleviated my dry eye symptoms I bought two different dry eye masks, the Dry Eye Mask by Heyedrate and the MediViz Blepharitis Eye Mask.  When I received them, I noticed that they were virtually identical: packaging identical, shape and size of the masks virtually identical. The only two differences I found are (1) that one came with a green pouch and the other came with a blue pouch; and (2) the MediViz may be just a slight bit smaller.  They both had the same instructions and felt the same on.  I tried the Heyedrate mask first.  After using it for two days, my dry eye symptoms were much better.  I went ahead and tried the MediViz on the third day, mainly to compare the two.  In my opinion, they both felt the same on my face, both seemed to work well, and my experience with both was the same.  After microwaving them for 20 seconds, neither were too hot to the touch, so I could immediately apply them to my eyes.  And as several reviewers noted, both cooled off within 5 to 10 minutes. I did not feel this was a bad thing, since the instructions say to apply for up to 10 minutes. So the 5 - 7 minutes I used each of them seemed sufficient to alleviate my symptoms.  I am happy with my purchases and will keep both of them.  I didn't give a full 5 stars, because I would have preferred that the cloth covers were removable so I can wash them separately.

rating 3.0. There are pros and cons... Over all it's a good mask...howvevr there are pros and cons I'll list here.

Pros
Light weight on the eyes and face, the beads aren't packed in super tight so it's a comfortable fit.

Covers a larger area of the eyes/face than most masks

The material holds up to hand cleaning very well.

Cons
Because the beads aren't packed in tight, it doesn't retain heat as well. I have to heat this up 3 times to do my full routine VS my bruder I only heat it twice.

Each side reads a different temperature. I use a laser thermometer to make sure my compress is around 44-45C before I apply it to my face and the mask heats unevenly.

rating 5.0. If you battle with dry eyes, you need this Ever since my cataract operation, I have been experiencing what I would call chronic dry eyes. My ophthalmologist tells me that this can happen to some people after the procedure and suggested that I try soaking a facecloth in hot water and using it as a hot compress for about five minutes to help alleviate the problem.

Well, needless to say that facecloths don't stay hot for long, so using a compress wasn't an option. Then, I bought this eye mask and it solved my problem. Twenty seconds in the microwave and it stays comfortably hot for about ten minutes without a problem. I use it morning and night and best of all, no more dry eyes.

rating 4.0. Amazing product but be careful! Last about 3-4 days for me since I have oily skin and use oils in my daily skincare regimen. If you have sensitive skin, I recommend using this at the end of the day or when your face has produced some oil to protect it from getting a reaction (similar to when you bleach your hair). Mistakenly, I used this after washing my face and my skin reacted so badly from the dye that it ended up burning and scabbing the area. One capsule is like 3 separate dye process for me so I just pour enough for one process and put the rest back in a mini baggie. Next, my dye process in 3 different application. 1-2 minute just to get a light overall shape, the 2nd application for 3-4 minutes follows the shape guidelines, 2-3 minutes for details/touch ups. If the front of the brows ends up coming out too blocky, just use a qtip with some makeup remover to fade out the front to make it look more natural. Since it fades so fast on my skin, I usually just let the first day brows go dark bc it lightens significantly because of skincare/face washing.

Update:
I had stop using it so frequently (every week) bc if felt like my skin was getting more and more sensitive from it. I noticed that the more frequently I used it the more of an allergic reaction I got from it. I had to stop using it for a couple of months and have tried it again. I probably won’t be using this as an everyday routine but only for special occasions.

rating 5.0. but I always hated feeling like I NEEDED to do my eyebrows before ... Honestly and truly, this eyebrow tint changed my life. I have naturally blonde hair, eyebrows, and eyelashes. I dye my hair regularly to a dark reddish brown, and obviously need my eyebrows and eyelashes to match so as not to look weird. I wear mascara everyday no problem and have been anyways for years, but I always hated feeling like I NEEDED to do my eyebrows before I went into public. Plus I hate feeling like they look drawn on and too done up. Beyond that, if I spent the night at anyone's house I would have to wear at least brow mascara to bed and risked looking bad when I woke up with it smeared all over my face.
I read the reviews before I used this and everyone said to leave the dye on for around 5 minutes. However the box says 2 minutes. The first time I used the dye I was freaking out a little because I thought I was messing up by leaving it on so long. DON'T WORRY. After the first time, I leave it on for closer to 10 minutes now. The dye definitely makes your brows dark, but that's what I prefer.
The first time I used this, it was before I went over to my boyfriend's house for the night. I literally was just laying in his bed smiling at how happy I was that I wasn't wearing any makeup, I felt confident in my brows looking good, and that I wouldn't have to worry about how I looked in the morning. It was such a great feeling! My eyebrows are one of my biggest insecurities and this gave me such a confidence boost!
I actually ended up opening all the little capsules and emptying them into the little bag provided and I just scoop out a little at a time to use. I did this because when I emptied an entire capsule into the little mixing pot, it made SO MUCH DYE and I ended up throwing away 3/4 of what I made. They give you 16 capsules but this still felt like a huge waste. This way I make smaller batches and have less waste and can stretch the product longer.
I'd say the only two cons of this product are that it only lasts maybe 5 days before I have to reapply, and that it's hard to apply it without staining your skin. So don't dye your eyebrows right before you leave your house, I try to do it at night and by the morning my natural oils have made the dye lift a little. By day two you can't see the stains anymore.

rating 5.0. Awesome product! Works quickly and works well Awesome product! Works quickly and works well. My brows grow unevenly and sparce so it can only help so much, but the amount of time spent doing my brows as my daily makeup has drastically decreased thanks to this product!

rating 5.0. Gave me the perfect look! This worked very well. I was a bit worried about how dark it would come out but it looks nice. I have naturally sparse eyebrows and I'm trying to grow them out, but it seems that they are lengthening more than thickening, this was the perfect solutIon. It looks very natural, the only make up I ever put on is for my eyebrows so I can skip that step. Doesnt look dramatic like I need a full face of makeup to go with it...

I recommend not only having clean skin but also exfoliate beforehand! Maybe not right before because it'll sting (I did), but the day before. That way the tint isn't attaching to dry dead skin and will stick Better.

I used a whole capsule, but it definitely was not needed. Half or even a third would work. If you want it to look really natural, so the front of your eyebrows last, I let everything process for a couple of minutes, applying to both, Then did the front and went another two minutes, total processing time was around five minutes. I dont like gloves so my fingers did get stained, so wear them if you have somewhere to go the same day or a fresh mani

I'm writing this right after doing it, so I don't know about longevity, but even if you had to retouch every week, they give you enough capsules to last for almost at year, at minimum 6 months.

rating 1.0. UM, PSA: YOU PROBABLY SHOULDN'T USE THIS ON YOUR EYEBROWS I have sparse eyebrows, always have. I usually fill them in with a pencil and then go over that with Maybelline Brow Drama. It gets my brows how I like them and it's quick to do, but I want to just be able to wake up and go, fresh faced, without worrying about putting on brows (I really like the way I look with bolder brows!)

Saw this "eyebrow tinting kit" and all the positive reviews, decided to give it a try! First concerning thing is that the instructions state THIS PRODUCT MUST NOT BE USED FOR DYEING THE EYELASHES OR EYEBROWS (probably mainly just for caution to ensure no product gets into the eyes).

Second, the instructions talked a lot about "black henna" and THIS PRODUCT MUST NOT BE USED ON SKIN AS A TEMPORARY STAIN OR TATTOO. I'm familiar with real BAQ (body art quality) henna; I've used it for reddish tints in my hair and had henna tats before. I've also read about how to be cautious about using "black henna" because henna only comes in one color - hues of red! Any other color has been altered with sketchy chemicals.

Third, the instructions has a disclaimer at the very top stating information obtained from Amazon, bloggers, or social media has not been verified by the manufacturer - basically, just because everyone else says they're using this for "eyebrow tinting", the company is telling you to follow the instructions, which specifically tells you not to use it for that, and if you choose to do so anyway, they are not legally liable.

Hmm, interesting, but, #YOLO, I want my eyebrows snatched!

Clearly, I still used this for my brows lol so I hope my face doesn't fall off. I was super excited that it actually made my brows look thicker, clearly because the skin underneath my brow hairs has been tinted (breaking rules #1 and #2). The test spot on my arm only lasted a few days and so did my brows (of course, because it only tinted the skin under my brows, and as your skin renews, the stain fades away).

Maybe this product is "good" (remember, YOU SHOULDN'T USE THIS FOR EYEBROWS!!) for people with fair colored brows and want to make them darker. It does darken hair - I tested the mixture on a grey hair of mine.

Or maybe this product should just be used for it's intended purpose: beards, mustaches, temples, sideburns, and root touch ups, but even I wouldn't use it for that since the product is "black henna", which is questionable.

Even if this product didn't have a 77.2% chance of chemically burning/peeling my face off and making me blind, it doesn't even last, so just save your coins and play it safe - if you want bolder brows, get em microbladed, use Maybelline 48hr Tattoo Studio, or just go ahead and use that trusty pencil that won't possibly leave you scarred for life.

Last note, both times I used this product, I got a headache. Idk if it's the cause of it or just a coincidence.

rating 5.0. Exactly what I was looking for! This product was exactly what I was looking for! I have very blonde and sparse eyebrows & needed them to be darker. With this tint, I can make them any shape I want and it lasts for 1-2 weeks depending on how long I leave it on. I usually leave it on for about 5 minutes. It does stain your skin, but comes off after a couple of days of washing your face. Also, before applying, I would highly recommend washing your face, and do NOT apply any moisturizer immediately before or after application. If you do, your eyebrows could potentially turn a different color. I made the dumb mistake of applying a tinting lotion on right after using this and my eyebrows turned orange. Lol.. however, as long as you use common sense, this is a great product and I highly recommend this product to anyone who wants darker eyebrows!
**Update** I added a photo for product reference. It's still my favorite and one box has lasted several months! It even holds up in the pool! During sunny weather I do 2 applications for a darker effect. Just DON'T leave it on any longer than 5-10 minutes, otherwise it looks splotchy. Does make getting ready soooo much faster!

rating 5.0. Tips and Tricks Love this stuff!
- It does dye your skin a bit so be careful to only put it where you want color. Don't be willy nilly when applying it.
- The dye on your skin washes off after about 2 days if you wash your face twice a day like I do. This is for dying your eyebrow hairs. If you don't have the hairs to dye, don't buy this stuff.
- You DO NOT need to use an entire capsule for each application. I get about 4-5 applications out of each capsule. Just open it, dump a little bit into the mixing cup, and put it back together to save for later. I do a 1/1 mixture (eyeballing it) of the powder to the cream.
- This WILL stain your clothes if you aren't careful.
- I reapply every 10 to 14 days or when I see that my brows are getting light again.

rating 5.0. I love not having to do my eyebrows with the rest ... So after reading a lot of reviews about this product I left the mixture on for about 3 min rather than the instructed 1 min.

Some peoples hair may not hold dye as well as others, but my hair has always held dye well. even Semi permanent and dyes do not ever fully wash out of my hair, and temporary dyes tend to cling longer than advertised.

For me, this tint works extremely well. I find that an application of 3 min makes my eyebrows dark enough to match my hair, which is a very dark brown. I only need to reapply every 3 weeks or so, but after 2 weeks I can see obvious fading.

I love not having to do my eyebrows with the rest of my makeup anymore, and will definitely buy this again.

rating 4.0. Good--but not excellent for Vaping I use VG for vaping.
Have been mixing my own juices since 2007 when vaping started.
The quality of VG and PG is very important, otherwise I will start coughing.
My point of reference is essential depot's VG and PG. Their quality is top notch, although their prices are higher.
VG should taste sweet, and have no other residual taste apart from the sweetness. If you taste any bitterness behind the sweetness, do not use it for vaping.
This VG is sweet but I can taste a faint aftertaste mixed up in the sweetness, which makes me think it's not USPS food grade. On another note, I am not coughing, which tells me it's ok to vape.

rating 5.0. Great product! This stuff is great for Making Cannabis Tincture. Great price for a gallon anywhere online and also anywhere in store. I filled 3 huge jars and still have a bunch left for next time. This is also Kosher.

My tincture instructions:

Fill jars with leaf matter
Fill with Glycerine Tincture
Leave a little space at the top.

Screw on Caps. Mark dates on top of caps.

Leave for 60 Days.

Put jars in the over for 20-60 Minutes on 100 degrees Fahrenheit ( some people argue to do this first. )

Filter out Leaf matter with cheesecloth and funnel into dropper bottles.

rating 4.0. EXPENSIVE BUT VERY EFFECTIVE.  YOU KNOW WHAT YOU ARE GETTING. This review is for the ANCIENT MINERALS "GOODNIGHT' MAGNESIUM LOTION WITH MELATONIN.  An excellent product to help you get to sleep faster.  You just use one press of the pump to release the amount of product and then spread it on your skin.  I put some on my temples and the rest on the inside of my arms.  It is absorbed fairly quickly and does its job quickly, too.  It helps me to get to sleep faster (nothing works all the time) and is a very effective product, easy to use and not messy.  I find it superior to the MELATONIN SLEEP CREAM, which is also a very good product, but this seems to be more potent and works faster.  It is also very much more expensive.  You get 2.5 oz. (75ml) in one container.  This, of course, contains magnesium which also helps sleeping, and the manufacturer states clearly that each full pumpful delivers 25mg of elemental magnesium along with 3mg of melatonin.  I appreciate their specifying exactly what you are getting.  Since each pumpful delivers 1 ml of product, this container should deliver 75 dosages of product.  Unfortunately, MELATONIN SLEEP CREAM does not specify the amount of active ingredient you are getting, which I failed to mention in my review of it, although the jar contains 4 oz. of product.  So, there is no way to know how much melatonin you are getting since the product is not metered and the label doesn't tell you the melatonin content.  Both are good products, but I cannot compare dosages or contents of product delivered when you apply them.  The only reason I didn't give it five stars is because of the expensiveness of the product.

rating 4.0. Better than some others I have thick, long, dry, colored hair. My hair always feels stiff and crunchy on the ends so I really need a good moisturizing mask. My hair has since seemed to go back to stiff and crunchy though. I only shampoo once a week (more if necessary) and condition probably 3 times a week, so I may need to use this avocado "sauce" more often. Having long, thick hair, I did have to use a good amount and don't know if I would spend the money needed to use this more often. The scent is light and clean, texture is a little thicker than the average conditioner.
I did find a common "miracle" shampoo and conditioner brand, in a purple bottle, on the store shelf that also has avocado oils and seemed to work very well.
There's absolutely nothing wrong with this Sauce, just not in my budget for something I may need to use more often.

rating 4.0. In love with this In love with this! I do a ton of dark eyeshadow makeup, and I always clean the brushes right after use. This made it a lot easier because it's fast, and dries immeditley! I reccomend using this as needed (warm water and soap) then running it under some clean water from the sink, and drying again.

I can now clean all of my makeup brushes in less than half the time it would take to manually do them.

It is a little hard on liquid stuff such as foundation, so you may need to clean 2-3x. Especially if you have lots of build up and don't clean for a while.

It is difficult on double sided brushes unfortunatley. I usually just wet one side, and lightly stick it inside of the attachment and clean them. I've had no issue with the brush, but we'll see!

rating 5.0. Love these! I was absolutely happy with these nail polishes! They are a metallic type finish but with the really cool chameleon color shift. They look different colors in different lighting. They can be used without magnet too but magnet gives them a very neat even more shifty effect. I do reccomend using a black or darker colored base coat for optimum effect, but you can also pull it off as is. You just need a few coats. Also, I recommend giving the bottle a little shake before opening and applying and holding the magnet over the nail for a few seconds to really get the magnetic effect. I like that it comes with 6 different colors. Some of them did look similar in the bottles but they are definitely different once you apply them. I will note that I did not have a proper magnetic wand but I used a regular round magnet I had at home and still got the magnetic effect. I would definitely reccomend these.

rating 5.0. Northern Lights ON MY NAILS! [[VIDEOID:b13de6121f6a1bdb45c0cf46a995ace5]] I purchased this product for the purpose of review.
I really loved the effect I got from this polish. It does take a bit of practice though, so, as a beginner, I wouldn't expect to get the same results as the promo pics.
The magnetic particles only react while the polish is wet so you have to be really fast and hold the magnet as close as you can to the nail, without touching. The first coat dries so fast you won't really see much result, but each layer sort of reactivates the previous one so the effect will get a little stronger each time. You MUST hold the magnet over it until each layer is dry to the touch. Then you need to use a top coat and it will really pop!
I am no pro at this so I couldn't get a crisp line but I think if I had a stronger magnet it would have been more detailed.

This set does not come with a magnet.

It took 19 days to arrive, which is typical for this type of item, coming from China.
The product packaging is very nice and the ingredients are listed, in English, on the back of the box. All items were also placed in individual zip lock bags and wrapped together, snugly, in foam sheeting for safe shipping.

I am very pleased with the quality of this product and the obvious care that was taken to ensure that my order arrived undamaged.

rating 5.0. They actually work! I absolutely love these!

It doesn't come with a magnet and I was skeptical at first, but the I found a strong enough magnet on my fridge and the magic started to happen!

Absolutely beautiful!
They're multichrome and change colors depending on the lighting and angle you're looking at them in.
Best worn over black polish, the polish themselves are very sheer, but corresponding dark polishes would be wonderful too.

I love that these are a polish and not a gel. I don't use gel on natural nails. Removes very well with pure acetone and reacts well with regular top coat.

Highly highly recommend for every nail lover out there trying to spice up their collection!

rating 4.0. Takes a little practice, but pretty in the end Very excited to get my first magnetic polishes. They came packaged very securely in foam and individually boxed. My first attempt didn’t go well, just couldn’t get it to work. Rather than constantly removing polish from own nails, I switched to pop sticks.

I started with a base coat of black. Once dry I painted one thick coat of the magnetic polish and immediately held the magnet over it, (in my experience it appears coat need to be thick and you need to work quickly) worked great!

So I attempted my own nails again, and it didn’t come out as well. I just couldn’t get as sharp of a line. It could be my nails are just to short with small nail beds, if the coat is to thick it floods my nails. I still love what I did get, when moving my fingers the line I did get appears to move, it’s very pretty and I got several compliments on them.

I did try using different magnets, stuff I had on my refrigerator as well as the Frcolor Double-head Stick Wand for 3 D Magnetic CAT Eye that I purchased on Amazon. It was a strong magnet, I had to really pull to get it off my fridge when I tested it. That magnet work best, As it was the strongest of what I had.

Overall, I like this polish and will enjoy using it.

rating 5.0. Great variety set of magnetic multichrome polishes This set comes with 6 polishes, all different colors of multichrome shifts.
The shade names are Fairbanks Art, Lightning, Greenland Night, Aurora Borealis, The Gravity, and Astral Realm. I applied all of the polishes onto clear nail swatch sticks. I started with an opaque black base and did two coats of each of the polishes. I used a magnet I got from Born Pretty store over each of the coats. Afterwards I applied a topcoat and held the magnet over the topcoat for ~30 seconds per the instructions up above.
As far as the color descriptions, Fairbanks Art shifts between rose gold, yellow, and lime green at extreme angles. Lightning shifts between orange, yellow, and olive-y green. Greenland Night shifts between pale blue, purple, pink, yellow, and lime green. Aurora Borealis shifts between aqua, blue, purple, pink, and rose gold at extreme angles. The Gravity shifts between emerald green, pale blue, pink, and gold. Astral Realm shifts between purple/pink, rose gold, gold, yellow, and even a bit of green. I’d say my favorite out of the selection is Aurora Borealis.
The only downside of magnetic polish in general is that it is more layers than just throwing on a solid creme color. However, the effect is sure to impress. I wore it for the first time today and actually got a compliment on my nails which always feels great. :)

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Very cool effects Where do I start to describe the dimensions of this nail polish?!  I've attached 4 pictures, 2 in natural light and 2 in the artificial light of my bathroom.  In artificial light, you can really see the 3D effects. In natural light, the chameleon color shift really shows. You get 6 colors in the set, all beautiful.  This set does not come with the magnet but, I already had one so it was no big deal. First,  I polished all my nails with a black base color, 2 coats, and I let it dry thoroughly. I found it was best to work with one nail at a time. Give the bottle a good shake each and every time just before you apply it to the nail. That way, the magnetic particles stay mixed because they tend to settle to the bottom of the bottle quickly.  After applying one coat, hold the magnet as close as possible to the nail for about 30 seconds. Then, apply your favorite top coat and hold the magnet over your nail for another 30 seconds before moving on to the next nail. The effects are gorgeous! Love these!

input: rating 5.0. Easy to hold and use This is my new "go to" stamper.  Easy to hold and use.  The Stamper Head did not seem to require 'prepping'.  However, I did washed it in a little dish soap wiped with alcohol and finished with a lint roller.  Stamper Head is soft but not too squishy so images are not overly distorted. A light touch picks up images and stamps on nails.  The Stamper Holder allows it to stand upright so it is not rolling around,  The Stamper Head is about the same size as the usual 'XL' Stamper.  Delivery was fast, ahead of quoted Delivery Date.  The Parcel and Contents arrived in excellent condition..

rating 5.0. Great variety set of magnetic multichrome polishes This set comes with 6 polishes, all different colors of multichrome shifts.
The shade names are Fairbanks Art, Lightning, Greenland Night, Aurora Borealis, The Gravity, and Astral Realm. I applied all of the polishes onto clear nail swatch sticks. I started with an opaque black base and did two coats of each of the polishes. I used a magnet I got from Born Pretty store over each of the coats. Afterwards I applied a topcoat and held the magnet over the topcoat for ~30 seconds per the instructions up above.
As far as the color descriptions, Fairbanks Art shifts between rose gold, yellow, and lime green at extreme angles. Lightning shifts between orange, yellow, and olive-y green. Greenland Night shifts between pale blue, purple, pink, yellow, and lime green. Aurora Borealis shifts between aqua, blue, purple, pink, and rose gold at extreme angles. The Gravity shifts between emerald green, pale blue, pink, and gold. Astral Realm shifts between purple/pink, rose gold, gold, yellow, and even a bit of green. I’d say my favorite out of the selection is Aurora Borealis.
The only downside of magnetic polish in general is that it is more layers than just throwing on a solid creme color. However, the effect is sure to impress. I wore it for the first time today and actually got a compliment on my nails which always feels great. :)

rating 5.0. Don’t forget to buy a magnet! This product is amazing! Did exactly what it said it would do. Honestly it was hard to pick a favorite. Multidimensional and so vibrant even without the magnet. I can’t wait to try other magnets with them!

rating 4.0. Takes a little practice, but pretty in the end Very excited to get my first magnetic polishes. They came packaged very securely in foam and individually boxed. My first attempt didn’t go well, just couldn’t get it to work. Rather than constantly removing polish from own nails, I switched to pop sticks.

I started with a base coat of black. Once dry I painted one thick coat of the magnetic polish and immediately held the magnet over it, (in my experience it appears coat need to be thick and you need to work quickly) worked great!

So I attempted my own nails again, and it didn’t come out as well. I just couldn’t get as sharp of a line. It could be my nails are just to short with small nail beds, if the coat is to thick it floods my nails. I still love what I did get, when moving my fingers the line I did get appears to move, it’s very pretty and I got several compliments on them.

I did try using different magnets, stuff I had on my refrigerator as well as the Frcolor Double-head Stick Wand for 3 D Magnetic CAT Eye that I purchased on Amazon. It was a strong magnet, I had to really pull to get it off my fridge when I tested it. That magnet work best, As it was the strongest of what I had.

Overall, I like this polish and will enjoy using it.

rating 5.0. Love these! I was absolutely happy with these nail polishes! They are a metallic type finish but with the really cool chameleon color shift. They look different colors in different lighting. They can be used without magnet too but magnet gives them a very neat even more shifty effect. I do reccomend using a black or darker colored base coat for optimum effect, but you can also pull it off as is. You just need a few coats. Also, I recommend giving the bottle a little shake before opening and applying and holding the magnet over the nail for a few seconds to really get the magnetic effect. I like that it comes with 6 different colors. Some of them did look similar in the bottles but they are definitely different once you apply them. I will note that I did not have a proper magnetic wand but I used a regular round magnet I had at home and still got the magnetic effect. I would definitely reccomend these.

rating 5.0. Very cool effects Where do I start to describe the dimensions of this nail polish?!  I've attached 4 pictures, 2 in natural light and 2 in the artificial light of my bathroom.  In artificial light, you can really see the 3D effects. In natural light, the chameleon color shift really shows. You get 6 colors in the set, all beautiful.  This set does not come with the magnet but, I already had one so it was no big deal. First,  I polished all my nails with a black base color, 2 coats, and I let it dry thoroughly. I found it was best to work with one nail at a time. Give the bottle a good shake each and every time just before you apply it to the nail. That way, the magnetic particles stay mixed because they tend to settle to the bottom of the bottle quickly.  After applying one coat, hold the magnet as close as possible to the nail for about 30 seconds. Then, apply your favorite top coat and hold the magnet over your nail for another 30 seconds before moving on to the next nail. The effects are gorgeous! Love these!

rating 5.0. Northern Lights ON MY NAILS! [[VIDEOID:b13de6121f6a1bdb45c0cf46a995ace5]] I purchased this product for the purpose of review.
I really loved the effect I got from this polish. It does take a bit of practice though, so, as a beginner, I wouldn't expect to get the same results as the promo pics.
The magnetic particles only react while the polish is wet so you have to be really fast and hold the magnet as close as you can to the nail, without touching. The first coat dries so fast you won't really see much result, but each layer sort of reactivates the previous one so the effect will get a little stronger each time. You MUST hold the magnet over it until each layer is dry to the touch. Then you need to use a top coat and it will really pop!
I am no pro at this so I couldn't get a crisp line but I think if I had a stronger magnet it would have been more detailed.

This set does not come with a magnet.

It took 19 days to arrive, which is typical for this type of item, coming from China.
The product packaging is very nice and the ingredients are listed, in English, on the back of the box. All items were also placed in individual zip lock bags and wrapped together, snugly, in foam sheeting for safe shipping.

I am very pleased with the quality of this product and the obvious care that was taken to ensure that my order arrived undamaged.

rating 4.0. The kids love them Overall, these are great bath bombs.  They look cute, smell really nice, and my kids love finding the figures that are hidden inside. rating 5.0. There are 800+ Pokemon in the Pokedex; these are REAL! My 25 year old grown azz husband loves these. He was so excited to take a bath when I got these for him for our anniversary. He knows all the Pokemon and I don't know how because there's over 800 in the Pokedex. Over 800!

One reviewer said these were false advertising but I identified the Pokemon in their photos as Cacturne and Monferno. Another reviewer said these were fake Pokemon but I identified the one in their photo as Amaura.

They are legit Pokemon in these. The first one my husband got, he didn't remember its name but he knew it was one of the newer ones. It looked like a pink blob to me. We got 2 Pikachu's in one set and were bummed because we wanted some of the less popular Pokemon. We got Raiku and Flygon too.

I highly recommend these for the biggest Pokemon nerds you know. It's not for people who only want the originals, because you're playing the lottery with around 800 different Pokemon.
I hope this info helps.
