rating 5.0. electrolisis unit this product works well had one befrore and lost it somewhere recomend it highly to anyone needing hair removal places i removed 10 years ago still no hair

rating 4.0. It works... While the thing does work, it is annoying to use.
You have to keep contact with the metal plate on the base, as well as on the pen. On top of that, every tip I got was bent to hell. Because of that, it's more difficult to get it going correctly.

The tweezers are completely useless. the tips are rounded way too much, so it wont grab the hairs very well.
Also, uses 9volt battery, so good luck getting rechargeable for it, to cut costs. It's still cheaper than going to a pro, but it takes a lot of time and patience.
If you have both, plus a reasonably high pain tolerance, this is a great product.. with an upgrade or two.
rating 4.0. Really saves money I used to pay a lot of money for electrolysis.  Now I can do it when I want and at what strength I want.  I have removed many facial hairs with it.
rating 2.0. okay This might work but there seems to be a problem with the one I received it won't operate with the tip extended

rating 3.0. Item is difficult to use Item is difficult to use. I plan on paying the fees to have a professional do it. It isn't as pricey as I thought. The seller was great and the product is good. Just too much of a hassle. If you wanna save money and you are patient go for it!

rating 5.0. Clean +Easy Deluxe Electrolysis Home kit I gave this home kit 5 stars because, it is very powerful just like going to the professional to have it done. The instructions are simple and easy to follow , but you will need a magnifying x20 or higher lighted mirror to see your pore opening clearly to insert the needle. The effects last up to two -three weeks for me before I have to do it over again.  I would recommend this product to anyone with facial hair, which they would like to get rid of and don't have the time to go and get treated. In the long run it will cost you less as these professionals do it in a way to make sure you always come back.
rating 2.0. Didn't work Made red spots and the hair grew back. I did what the instructions said. Not for me I guess :/

rating 4.0. Slow process, but good results I was nervous about getting this. There are SO MANY models and brands and reviews out there that I finally decided on one that was within my price range to try, but also had decent reviews. I've had this now for about 4 months and have not had any re-growth of the hairs I've taken out. That's what I was looking for - lasting results. That being said, it is tricky to get used to doing this. It's best if you have someone doing it for you. There are a couple of things to keep in mind: 1. You go one hair at a time, and each one took me about 3-4 minutes, and the instructions say not to do more than a square inch of skin at a time. So depending on how much of an area you want to do, and how dense the hair is it may take months and months to clear a significant area, and that's if you do it every other day. 2.) You will have unsightly sores. You are penetrating your epidermis and electrocuting the hair follicle, so you will get a scab on each pore you zap. I used the Tea Tree lotion they recommend on Amazon and it seemed to work fine. I don't know if it would have been the same without the oil. My scabs were there the same amount of time any other scab I've had has been on me - about a week.

So it's slow going and leaves scabs, but once the scabs went away my hair has not come back at all. It's been great that way! I'm really glad I bought it. The reasons I didn't give five stars is because it said, "Clean and Easy". It's not easy, and when something leaves you scabbed over, that doesn't scream "clean" to me. The other reason is because I had to zap each follicle twice on the highest setting before it worked. But I gave it four stars because it did work! So for the price, and once you get used to it, and if you have a way to hide the scabs for a week, then it's great. I'm happy with the results, which for me is the bottom line.

rating 1.0. Electrolysis I was so mad at this item, because first of all the needle was so weak and flimsy that it wouldn't even penetrate the skin; then when it did, I felt nothing.  Just not worth my money.  I wish I would have returned it.

rating 3.0. but the return process was quick and easy. I would try this one again in the ... Only worked for one time, but the return process was quick and easy. I would try this one again in the future. While it worked, it worked well!
rating 1.0. I would like a refund DIdn't work and sometimes it didn't even come on. I would like a refund.

rating 4.0. Not sure what everyone is complaining about I was really worried based on the claims of so many that this device doesnt work.  For me it works fine.  The needle is really not that hard to use, you just need to have some finesse. If you read the directions is says to only put pressure inline with the needle and it wont bend.  So far I havent had any problems.  Just dont use gorilla strength and you will be fine.  For me I use a 4 on my legs and a 1 or 2 on my face for three beeps.  It leaves welts but they go away in about an hour or so.  So this is not a right before date night kind of thing.  Also it is really tedious, but if the hairs I zap dont come back or only do once more, it is totally worth the time investment. rating 5.0. It WORKS ! I have tried several other types and this one is my favorite !!! I don't get that residue either you sumtimes get after.6 hrs or so ..(you don't need to use much at all) ...the tightening means its working !!!! And the best part is how long it lasts....at least one day or close ! I still noticed lines were tightened the next morning. Good product....so far my best !

UPDATE : This is my most favorite....works better then the expensive name brands for me ! I add a thin layer of moisturizer first (not a greasy type)....then I add a teeny bit under each eye but do not rub it in...you just pat it on and do crows feet area also. Useing toooo much will cause a flakey residue with all the brands when it dries. Also try not to rub under your eyes after applying...it will undo your results...there all that way. This product is the best one I have tried....just gotta learn the tricks of useing these products. I got residue later in the day useing OTHER brands...yuck....I don't get that with 'this' product at all. (unless you use tooo much or rub under your eyes).

rating 2.0. Elmer's Glue repackaged? I should read the reviews before I buy something. Even something as cheap as this.

It definitely seems like it's Elmer's Glue in a nail polish bottle. It is very slow to dry, and when it does finally dry, it's clear, and not very sturdy when I tried to peel it off, it stretched & broke, much like peeling dried Elmer's Glue off my hand when I was a kid.
Plus, the packaging is an un-labeled frosted glass jar with a nail brush in the cap. There are no details anywhere about the contents or directions for use.
I've wasted a few dollars, but I won't be using this!

rating 3.0. great diffuser with a fatal design flaw (and misleading name) It's probably a very good diffuser, but it doesn't stay on my Bespoke Labs blow dryer. This seems to be a common problem. The device just should not be labelled "universal". I don't even see how it could stay on any blow dryer; there's only tiny little bumps inside of it to cling to the nozzle. Just a fatal design flaw.

I'm using it, reluctantly. I have to use two hands to hold the diffuser on the blow dryer. It's a nice big diffuser with nice long prongs. Too bad about the design flaw.

rating 5.0. Awesome buy! Probably one of the best diffusers I've owned. It fits my Bio Ionic Powerlight blow dryer perfect! It has an adjustable metal shield on the inside so you can control air flow. Great deal, I would highly recommend!

rating 5.0. This was a steal at this price!! Eeeeeeekkk I'm so excited about this!! I love my Dry Bar Buttercup hair dryer, but really wanted a diffuser for it because I like to scrunch my hair time to time. When I added it to my cart, it was $21 I believe. That's still cheaper than Sephora so I was going to get it but waited. SO GLAD I DID. Randomly, it dropped to $12.12!!!! Purchased immediately!!

It fits my hair dryer perfectly. But, I can tell by looking at it that my hair dryer isn't a standard size on the end so I had to purchase the Bio Ionic brand since that's who makes my hair dryer. Worth it! It says universal, but I would still take measurements to make sure it'll fit yours if it isn't a Bio Ionic brand because they are not ever all universal.

The part that attaches to your hair dryer is not a hard plastic- it is rubbery (but firm) so it slides onto your hair dryer but doesn't "click" into place. I think that's why they say it's universal because this allows for some difference in the size of your dryer. But still do your research and compare your hair dryer to the size of the Buttercup hair dryer because it fits it perfectly.

You can also twist the diffuser to open up the vents or close them to control the air flow (see pictures). There will always be air flow on the outer ring of the diffuser, but you can completely close off the center, which is nice if you don't want a ton of force.

I love it and it was completely worth it!

rating 3.0. I purchased this diffuser to go along with the Bio ... I purchased this diffuser to go along with the Bio Ionic Power Light Pro Dryer my old diffuser did not fit the dryer.  It wasn't expensive so I didn't mind buying it.  It's just ok.  I find it gets very hot even with the dryer on a lower setting.  There is a piece of metal in it that was never in any diffuser I had in the past.  I'm not sure if it is there to help dry your hair faster but I just think it heats up and forces you to move the dryer or burn your head.  BTW the Bio Ionic Power Light Pro Dryer is an awful product for the money it doesn't do what it promises.

rating 1.0. not universal! 2 inches in diameter or less, measure your dryer now Similar to MANY previous reviewers, this diffuser did NOT fit any of my hair dryers: I have three different brands, and the diffuser was just a half an inch small for ALL of them. DO NOT think that you will just get lucky, do the measurements on the hair dryers you own! They should be absolutely no more than 2 inches in diameter. I also find it suspicious that this measurement is nowhere on the product description on the Amazon site or on the packaging box for this diffuser.

rating 5.0. Great for DryBar Very happy to find a diffuser for my DryBar hair dryers, both regular and baby bar(travel size).  This fits both sizes very well.  The opening flexes for whatever size hairdryer you need.

rating 5.0. Where have you been all my life? Best diffuser I have ever had. Fits my Rusk hair dryer perfectly. I love that you can control the air flow. My hair gets dry so fast, the fingers lift to give volume and frizz is controlled. Highly recommend!

rating 3.0. Not universal I bought this after my Deva trained/curly-specialist stylist used it on my hair. It doesn't move the hair at all as it's drying, keeping down the frizz. Slightly deep, to dry more hair at a time.

But sadly this does not fit my "Revlon Perfect Heat" drier. The drier's end has a ridge at the last 1" or so that's smaller than the rest of the nozzle. That last inch fits, but the rest does not, so it won't stay on. This diffuser requires that more than an inch of the drier be inserted, as the rubberized treads inside that make it a flexible fit are located further down the barrel. Considering I don't have an unknown or rare brand drier, this diffuser should probably not be called universal. I considered buying the bio ionic drier to go with it, but not at that price.

rating 5.0. These last forever!  I still have ones I bought years ago.  I have long thick hair, they hold great.  Love them! I have been looking for these for years.  I still have a few of the ones I bought years and years ago, but haven't been able to find them.  I just figured they were a relic of the past, and then I stumbled across them on Amazon.  I keep one in the shower, so after conditioning I can put my hair up while the conditioner does its thing.  I keep a few with my other hair products, in case I want to clip it in place till the gel or whatever product of the moment kicks in.  I keep a couple around for working out, to get my hair out of the way.  I keep a couple by my bedside, in case it's a warm night and I want it up.  These are so incredibly handy. I bought two packs of them, so that should last me a lifetime!

rating 5.0. YOU NEED THESE IN YOUR LIFE Great clips, although the ones I received were in a much different color scheme than the ones pictured. Mine are translucent pastel colors (some light gray and white). Didn't really care either way, however. These are so much better than traditional jawclips in terms of getting a grab on your hair. These clips are intended for hair-styling purposes more so than using IN a hairstyle if you get what I mean. I probably wouldn't wear one out-and-about but I do use them for sectioning off my hair when I'm blow-drying, curling, or straightening it. Also nice for using to get hair away from face while applying makeup or washing your face. The "grip" power these have on your hair is like nothing I've ever had in a hair clip. The word "clamp" in the product title is accurate. These do not budge  or shift, even in straight hair. They really lock your hair in, I think the triangular nature of the teeth on the clips has something to do with that. Very versatile clips that I will most definitely get a lot of use out of, and priced well for the amount you get.

rating 4.0. Pleased. I was concerned that these would have sharp teeth that could potentially damage my hair. But once they arrived, I saw that the teeth were slightly rounded at the top and smooth to the touch.

I like that they grip my hair firmly, but not too tightly.

The only thing I don't like is something a few other reviewers mentioned. The top part of the clamps that you squeeze together has sharp, pointy edges. So, one just needs to be careful when using them (or file the edges down with a nail file).

input: rating 5.0. Amazing for hair growth Love love love this product! I have been using it on my eyebrows, lashes, and cuticles. One drop goes a long way, and I apply nightly after my skincare routine. My eyebrows and lashes are naturally short, thin, and sparse, but the castor oil has noticeably lengthened and thickened my lashes and eyebrows after just 1 week. My cuticles are also super dry in the winters, and applying the castor oil every night keeps them from cracking. I've noticed that my nails also look healthier-the new nail growth is shinier and smoother. Can't wait to see results after month of using this product!

rating 5.0. Great for hair and lashes I apply this product to my eyebrows and lash line every night before I go to bed. Usually one has to apply castor oil fairly religiously each night to see results, but I've been using been using this product for about two weeks and have already noticed some improvements! Sometimes I get this stubborn pimple right underneath my eyebrow, but since using this castor oil it hasn't made an appearance. The packaging comes with an eyebrow brush and a lash line tool so that you can apply the oil easily to these areas.

A little goes a long way, I apply it in the evening before I'm about to sleep and just wash it off in the morning. I haven't used it for lashes but that's phase 2!

rating 5.0. AMAZING product!!! I’ve been using this product for about 2 weeks now and I’ve been in love with it since it came in the mail!!!! I have naturally dry hair and skin so I tend to lose a lot of hair, especially when I’m stressed. This product has seriously worked wonders already and it’s way better than I expected!!

I apply about 1-2 drops to my hair after I wash it and using just that small amount has made my naturally dull and dry hair so much less frizzy and a lot more healthy looking. For my eyelashes, I apply a drop to each lash line every night and sometimes in the morning using the little brush it comes with. Though I haven’t used it long enough to see any substantial growth, my eyelashes have been so soft and hydrated that they actually do look a lot fuller and a tiny bit longer!!!

I’m honestly really impressed by this brand. This is the first product I’ve tried of theirs and the quality is great! Their prices are so reasonable it makes you wonder how so many companies can get away with selling virtually the same product for double, sometimes even triple, the price. Also, the bottle will last you a long time because you only need 1-2 drops per use and a little bit goes a long way.

input:
rating 5.0. Best eye drop EVER! This is either the 5th or 6th eye drop I've tried. I love it!!! Finally....an eye drop that lets my very dry eyes feel moist and normal again. My eyelids float over my eyes as they are supposed to, without dragging or feeling scratchy, and the relief is long lasting. I have an auto immune disorder and have been desperately trying to find something that truly addresses my severe dry eye syndrome. I have finally found it. I turned around and ordered another so I can keep one in my purse. If this ever becomes unavailable I will panic.
Addendum: As other reviews have mentioned; the method of application does take some getting used to. It is unlike any eye drop applicator I've used before. I have gotten a couple of missed drops on my cheeks as I've been perfecting my technique. But, the relief obtained is absolutely worth it.

rating 5.0. Best OTC eye drops ever! These are the next best thing save for Restasis, which is by prescription only, and if you are on Medicare, your copay for a three months supply comes to $370.00.  Compared to that cost, Hylo-Forte is a true bargain, and it does the same as Restasis.  I happen to have chronic dry eye syndrome, and Hylo-Forte works fine for me.  I apply it in the morning and at bed time.  Very seldom do I need to reapply in between.  The application just takes a little practice.  You may spill a few drops in the beginning.  I highly recommend it for anybody with dry eyes.

rating 5.0. With practice I guess it might get better. I just wish it was a normal bottle ... I have a very severe type of dry eye.  It took several days of saturation before it started working. But it did work!!  My only issue is with the packaging.  You cannot see how much is left and it does not say how many drops are in the bottle. Also because its a jell you can't tell how much is left by shaking it.  It is also difficult to use - directions tell you to pull your eye down. It seems the eye lashes get in the way. Then you have to use a pump action on the bottom. The drops that are pumped out are very tiny making it hard to tell if they actually come out. It is just very awkward - some missed drops. With practice I guess it might get better. I just wish it was a normal bottle of eye drops. But hey, its a wonderful product!!! Nothing else has ever worked like these eye drops. Maybe they will improve the packaging some day with enough complaints. I will order more because of the relief it brings.  THANKS HYLO FORTE!! ( I'm giving it a five because it works!!)

rating 4.0. Good drops, strange bottle The drops do seem to lubricate my eyes, but the delivery system (for the drops themselves) is the worst I've encountered. Why not just a simple drip bottle like most  others? I have to use them in a magnifying mirror, operating the plunge system with both hands, and still I miss the mark occasionally, and that's irritates me because they're so expensive. These would be fine if you were confined to lying in bed and had to have someone else put drops in your eyes.

rating 5.0. These have made such an improvement in my daily comfort!!!! Hands down the absolute best drops for severe dry eye. NOTHING found in drugstores here in the US comes close. I have very dry eyes, not due to inflammation, so prescription steroids and Restasis don't help at all. Tear duct stents were not a panacea, but did help, however they don't stay in place forever, and now my insurance no longer pays for the stents. These Hylo-Forte drops allow me to wear contact lenses all day long. And, my lenses that were supposed to last two weeks, but were actually lasting me three or four days at the very best case, are now lasting me close to two weeks, over ten days.

For those that complained about not being able to dispense drops, I don't know if they got a defective bottle or what, but, to use, you take off (by pulling) the little protective cap, then invert the bottle and squeeze it like a plunger with your thumb on top, and a finger on either side of the tip where the drops dispense from. Drops do not dispense by squeezing the sides of the bottle together.

rating 5.0. Best Ever I have been suffering from dry eyes for over 3 years,tried everything OTC and stayed awy from Restasis since it is too expensive ,My eyes is so dry that i have to apply other products every hour or so,with this it really helped me ,the recommended dosage is 3 times a day,i use it every 4 hours during the day and for the First  time i dont have to get up in the middle of the night to add drops,and i get up in the morning dont have to look for the bottle right away,the product itself is light,doesn't cause any blurry effect,the bottle  itself is ok with me,no problem,shipping was extremely fast took about 8 days in holiday season ,excellent product,highly recommend for people who tried everything sold in the USA and didn't work for them.

rating 5.0. Hylo-Forte Eye Drops:  I give this 10 stars! This Hylo-Forte eye drop is nothing short of miraculous for me.  My eyes have been continuously gritty, itchy, dry, red and even blurry at times no matter what I did or what eye drops I used.  I read that eye drops containing hyaluronic acid, (which Hylo-Forte does) were recommended by the head of the  Johns Hopkins Wilmer Eye Institute.  So I ordered Hylo-Forte and some other preservative free drops suitable for carrying in pocket or purse.  When my order arrived I immediately read the package insert for the Hylo-Forte and put the first drop in my right eye which all that day had felt like there was a grain of sand in it every time I blinked.  I was astonished!!! The "grit" immediately disappeared and I quickly put a drop in the other eye.  The effect lasted for many hours with none of the previously mentioned symptoms apparent.  The package said the drops could be used up to 3 times a day, so even tho I probably didn't need to, I put them in my eyes before watching TV in the evening and again before bed.  In the morning the vision in one of my eyes was cloudy (as has been the usual case), but within 10 minutes of using the drops that cleared up and I have not used another dose for the rest of the day.  My eyes have continued to be comfortable, moist feeling and symptom free all day.  Additionally, the product has a very clever dispensing system which dispenses exactly one pre-measured drop per pump.  It's a very  nice feature since the bottle only contains10ml and I wouldn't want to waste any.  It is a very short time to have used this product and be commenting on it, but the results are so good and the relief so welcome I couldn't wait to post my review.  I will add an update to this review in a few weeks.
rating 5.0. Works great I love the squirt applicator. The solution lasts a long time and provides instant relief

rating 5.0. Must buy. Best eye drop out there! Game changer product! Ordered to replace the Blink Gel Tears eye drops after getting diagnosed with dry eye at 26. I learned from a fellow dry eyer that using drops and ointments with preservatives made her glands worse so I knew I needed to switch. Preservative filled products seem to be the only kind available in the US so I bought these drops on her recommendation and boy I’m so glad I did!

These drops feel so much more natural in the eye than anything else I’ve tried. You don’t know what your missing until you try these. They feel smooth and natural like your own eye made it. I was nervous about the price, but for this kind of comfort I’m content.

These are great for all day use. I’ve been using them at night for a month now until I fork over the money to get the Hylo Gel ones, but they’ve been doing well with the Vita-Pos eye ointment and a sleep mask to keep out air drafts.

Also, washing my face and eyelids every morning and night has helped a lot by reducing inflammation caused by pollutant particles (Doctor recommended).

I really wish these were readily available in the US. It’s hard to tell how much I’ve used in the bottle. I barely waste a drop with the one drop delivery system they’ve created which is really nice, but I still can’t tell how soon I should order another bottle.

**Cant be used with products that have preservatives it seems. If used together your eyes will sting and become itchy and hurt for at least 20 mins.

rating 3.0. Fantastic drops, Miserable bottle! The eye drop solution itself is BRILLIANT! The best I've found so far. No preservatives, no phosphate and feels silky smooth in the eye. No burning - and all drops burn my eyes - but not these. It contains Sodium Hylauronate, the best ingredient for healing and soothing the eye, in my estimation, and that is very hard to find in preservative free eye drops.

The bottle applicator however is bloody awfu! It is very awkward to hold and dispense with one hand, or two for that matter. Your wrist must be double jointed to operate this bottle. It's the only way! The bottle is thick white plastic and you cannot see how much of the solution is in the bottle. You hear NOTHING when you shake the bottle, so the only way you may know that the solution is actually in there, is if it comes out when you depress the plunger. You will most certainly be down to your last drop before you realize that you need to reorder, thus having to wait another three weeks for it to arrive, while your eyeballs dry out like rotting persimmons, and your eyelids suction to them like a squid on a diver's mask.

The bottle says 10 ml, so basically it contains 2 American teaspoons of solution. If you don't want to run out, it's best to just go ahead and reorder the day after you receive your first order to be on the side of caution. Whoever engineered this bottle applicator clearly drinks and thinks he knows things. Worse yet, a ligitimate company with an outstanding eye solution product said YES to this evil little bottle of frustration and buggery. Don't let this stop you from purchasing the drops. Have another person carefully read the instructions and dispense them for you. It's worth it.
rating 2.0. Delivery method is horrible The drops feel good but I wasted most of it as the dispenser is hard to use and I kept missing my eye when it finally dropped.  I will not buy again.

rating 1.0. Dumb dispenser The way you have to use this is awful. A drop does not come out. It sort of sprays. You can't tell if your getting the right amount. Very clumsy & awkward to use. rating 3.0. Difficult to Administer The product is hard to use. All eye drop products i have used just require squeezing the product to produce the drops. This product requires both holding it over the eye & depressing a button at the top of the tube to generate the drops. So, you have to use both hands just to generate the drops, which is awkward & leaves no hand free to open the eye, the better to apply the drops. Perhaps dexterous individuals can do it all with one hand, but not me, so in my opinion, it is difficult to use. I have no comment on the quality of the effectiveness of the drops.

input: rating 5.0. NICE ACNE, SCAR CREAM !!! I purchased this multiple action acne, scar, fine line and wrinkle cream by New York Labs,in hopes of improving the overall  appearance of my skin. . It helps moisturize and conditions my skin.  I have been using it twice a day since I received it and must say it is starting to show results. It soaks into the skin and leaves no heavy or greasy residue.  So far my fine lines are slowly starting to  disappear.  My face is really showing a nice glow. It is working great for me . Nice clean scent. Would recommend.

rating 5.0. Visible Results in a Month I bought this for my daughter.  She is in college and definitely not eating as cleanly as she did at home, she was very much dismayed at what this has done to her previously beautiful complexion.  Her boyfriend has also had this issue.  Even though they may try to make better choices you just can't avoid all the bad stuff when you are always on the go and have no idea what may be in that macaroni and cheese that looks so yummy in the cafeteria.  They both are using this and have noticed a marked improvement in the scarring even within the first month.  She didn't have a lot of scarring but a few marks were really bothering her and they are beginning to soften and some have disappeared all together.

rating 5.0. More than enough reasons to try this for a longer period of time I haven't used it for that long. So not the best person to present the case when it comes to old and obsolete, deep scarring. However, it showed immediate response to relatively new scars and even the 'emerging ones.' Notably, it removed my recent scar on my finger that was on the direct path to develop a deep z shaped cut/scar. It healed so quickly!

rating 4.0. Shows BIG Promise! So far, so good!

Have been using this for about one week, and am hoping to minimize a few older scars... And right out of the gate BOOM! I can see some results, so the long-term looks bright! I purchased this to use with the Olay Microdermabrasion/exfoliating scrub, and I've found that applying this after a good exfoliation makes a HUGE difference.

The scent is mild and pleasant, not overly feminine (which, as a dude, is important), and it's easy to work with. The side benefit seems to be some clearing of smaller wrinkles (and even one between my eyebrows)! Stoked thus far, and will certainly update as I get deeper on with the product. Bang-for-buck, it's looking very good!

UPDATE:

A couple of weeks in, and I'm seeing some improvement in the old scars, but the more recent ones are the biggest improvement... They're becoming much more neutral in tone, and fading! Side benefit: Tiny wrinkles are going away, especially around the eyes. Gotten a few compliments as to my looking younger, which is pretty nice as well!

The real trick seems to be in exfoliating a couple of times per week, and then dropping this product into the post-exfoliation routine.
Thus far, I'm excited, and happy as a mid-forties guy who people now claim looks thirty-five can be. Solid investment in my mug to be certain!

rating 5.0. It smells yummy! I first learned about Cora through an online ad about a year ago for a monthly subscription of feminine products (tampons and pads). I thought about subscribing since they were organic and read through the website to learn more. I was hesitant as I didn’t know the company well and didn’t want to try them due to most organic tampons having a leakage issue and be stuck with a subscription. Anyways, I never did get the subscription, but will consider after trying the One Wash. IM hyper allergic to most products and have a chemical sensitivity allergy, which is the worst allergy to have and needed to find a body wash that was simple and had natural ingredients. Through my search, I came across Cora (and remembered they were the tampon company) and figured I would try it as it was an “all in one” type of wash and I didn't need a subscription!
I love it! Its super sensitive on my skin and the scent is so good! I didnt have a reaction to it, which is a huge plus for me and I just wanted to keep smelling it. I love products that have a light orangish smell to it, it makes me want to have an orange creamsicle! IM so going to email the company and suggest they make a body lotion! That or make a candle! As for the product itself, my skin feels moisturized and not dried out like my other nontoxic body washes. It looks hydrated and feels smooth AND IM using less body oil/lotion on my skin. This is only after a few washes. My only hesitation would be as a body wash, a 8oz bottle for $16 is way too expensive as this bottle wouldn’t last but a mere few weeks, if that. Unfortunately a little doesn’t go a long way if using as a body wash, but would last a few months if just using as an intimate wash. I know that company gives back to those in need, but I just wont be able to afford this luxury often! Its either the wash or the tampons!

rating 5.0. Very great sanitizer if the scent and price are ok with you. I'm extremely satisfied with how newly this sanitizer was packed and sealed, it was shipped and sold by Amazon, maybe that is why! I already bought this sanitizer from Ulta and main site but I don't see they seal each mini bottle by plastic individually this way. This is a plus point for Amazon.
About the sanitizer, I know many people complain about its scent. Luckily, I already used the body lotion which is in same line with this sanitizer and has same scent, so at first when hearing too many complaints about the scent, I was not afraid much to try. Also, I like the design of this sanitizer bottle, it's square, cute with flip top cap which is very convenient to bring with you anywhere when you go out. I have tried lots of sanitizer brands during pandemic time, for me, I feel this is a very good sanitizer because it's creamy, thick but not greasy, dries very fast but doesn't make your hands dry at all, very comfortable after using and smells great (for me). The only thing that matters is the price. To be honest, for this size 66ml and more than $6 is too overpricing compared with same size sanitizers from other brands, even top brands like Purell or Safeguard. That's why I love it but I only bought 3 bottles as a big support from me to Hempz company and that's all. I would buy a whole box of this if I were a very rich girl as it's what I like, but my pocket will cry... So... Bye for now till I become much richer, lol...
Good job Amazon and Hempz.

rating 4.0. Really Like This Cap, One small change I'd like to see This is probably one of the best processing caps to get. Why? It pretty much fits your whole head unlike some others that are odd-shaped. Has very even heat compared to other caps - it is a bit cooler around the seams (which should be expected). I like the timer, don't have to sit and watch the clock and wonder "is that when I started?". 3 heat settings and I've used it on high with no problem when using with Malibu Crystal Gel Treatment.

The only thing I'd change is the strap. It's a bit 'hard' to get the strap through then through again the loops to tighten the strap under your chin and it doesn't stay tight tight. Thinking velcro maybe? So you could put the cap on and velcro the strap as tight or loose as you like. Otherwise, this cap has really come in handy. Both for deep oil conditioning treatments and when doing crystal gel demineralization treatments. Here's hoping this cap lasts!

Cap is a little small if you have a lot of hair.  Overall a good bargain for the price.
rating 1.0. Should have read the 8% of bad Wearing mine right now and it doesn’t heat up at all. Hope I can get my money back. Should have read the 8% of bad reviews
rating 2.0. Two Stars The heat is so low.

rating 4.0. I high hopes of being able to do a good deep conditioning treatment with this... Review edited This item was really disappointing. The most disappointing part was that I received a defective item that had a circuit issue. Further, I am under the impression that the seller sent me a used product based on the fact that the bag was not sealed and the general appearance of the product seemed used/recycled. I had high hopes of being able to do a good deep conditioning treatment with this, but the moment I plugged in the unit and selected the heat setting it started blinking on the medium setting and would not heat up, nor could I change the setting, even after plugging it out and waiting a few minutes for it to cool down before plugging it back in. Each time I plugged it in, it would consistently blink on the medium setting without heating up. After many attempts I got it to start heating up by manipulating the connection at the nape of the neck where the cord connects with the cap, but because of the short circuit, the same thing that happened before started happening again. What other reviewers have said about the intensity of the heat is true, it is mild or gentle (as stated on the package) .So if you want something stronger this product is not for you. I found the heat sufficient for the purpose I intended, but I still can't understand what kind of checks this product goes trough before shipping which could validate me receiving a DEFECTIVE item. Especially since other buyers have stated similar issues with this product. I am thoroughly disappointed and would not recommend this product to anyone. When I purchased it about 2 weeks ago I paid $35.99, up from $31.99 (which was the advertised price a few wks before I purchased). Now I see the price creeping up each day, and as at today its $39.99. So not worth the money!!

Update ** Apr 3, 2018.

Shortly after my initial review the seller contacted me and offered to send me a replacement unit, which I accepted. I received the new unit on March 12th, and since then I have used it three times and I'm happy to say there are no circuit issues with this new unit. It performs according to the product specifications. As I mentioned before, the intensity of the heat is really gentle. When I asked the seller about this they responded that "this heat cap is ETL certified for our consumer safety and this certification limits how high the heat cap is able to go". To that effect, I fell asleep using the device one day (not advised) and suffered no discomfort of any kind, so that speaks to how gentle the heat is, and how safe the device is for everyone to use. However, for my deep conditioning purposes it suits me well. If I need something more intense I will alternate with my hand-held steamer. I was really impressed by the support provided by the seller, and their determination to stand by their products, that's commendable. For these reasons I have changed my rating from 1 to 4 stars. Hope this helps another prospective buyer.

After leaving my initial review, I was surprisingly contacted by the seller who offered to provide me with either a refund or a replacement cap. I wanted to find out whether the first heat cap I received may have been defective so I opted to receive replacement unit. When I received the replacement, the first thing I noticed is that it is a different (seemingly updated) model matching what is now listed here. Compared to the original unit I received, this newer version definitely has improvements. The replacement cap fits much better than the original which greatly reduces the amount of heat that escapes. It also seems that this cap produces a better amount of heat than the original one I received a few months ago. The biggest improvement over the first cap I received is that this heat cap has a built-in timer which automatically shuts off after 15, 30, or 60 minutes of use.

I'm satisfied with the replacement cap I received. Kudos to the seller (Nilmee) for going above and beyond to make sure that this customer walked away happy with his purchase.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

I'm torn on this heat cap, when it comes down to it, it's just okay. I've been using it here and there over the past few months and I'm just not impressed. The heating on the cap is inconsistent -- some areas get warm while others have barely noticeable heating. My biggest gripe with the cap is that it seems to be sized either for people with large heads or with an overabundance of hair. I have a shorter hair style and I either have to pull on the chin strap or lay down while using the cap, otherwise what little heat the cap emits just escapes through gaps.

If you have short hair or have a smaller cranium, you may want to explore other options.

rating 5.0. best heating cap on amazon This is just...the best heating cap on Amazon. I use it with Red Pimento hair growth oil two to three times a week for 30 minutes each since I have male pattern baldness and some thinning hair. Very easy to use, just take the precautions seriously (this is like a hair dryer but it's in the form of a padded cap---so still keep the cord away from water, etc.)

I use the hottest setting each time. It's not too hot, but hot enough to heat up Red Pimento oil and increase blood flow to the scalp.

Also this thing does indeed come with a hair cap, which you should absolutely use when using the heating cap. Apply conditioning treatment or whatever you're using, then put the hair cap on, then the heating cap and adjust temperature. Comes with three temperature settings (low, medium, high essentially), and three timer settings (15 minutes, 30 minutes, 60 minutes).

Only con is that I would love it if there was a cordless heating cap I could charge via USB, but this is very reasonably priced and works just fine. I just read a book while I have this on usually.

rating 4.0. Gets the job done, but its just large heat coils in a cap. The product itself works fine. On the highest temps the heat still mild. It works just enough to give you a decent deep conditioner and get a nice sweat going. Other than that it's just the normal coils you can buy as "hand warmers" for pennies put into a cap with a voltage regulator attached to it. It doesn't get hot enough to explode batteries or harm electronics which is great as I can pop on some DJ headphones over it (or wear waterproof earbuds) and enjoy some entertainment while I'm waiting.

The plastic its made out of has sharp edges too which is ridiculous. This is something I thought was figured out in the manufacturing process a decade ago, but looks like whoever makes this is behind the times.

Pros:
- Easy to use
- Easy to clean
- Multiple heat settings
- Cheap

Cons:
- Awkward cord with very large remote for no reason
- Heat could be higher
- Material has sharp edges

rating 4.0. Ouch! I used this for the first time tonight. It was not as comfortable as I would have liked it to be. If you have very sensitive skin it will probably be a painful experience, especially if you're used to a soft wash cloth. I think it may have scratched my back and sides too much because it was burning after drying off. I believe I didn't have enough soap on it initially, which created more friction than needed, so I added more soap and it was a little more tolerable. Although uncomfortable, I endured, and my face and body came out with really smooth, soft skin. After slathering on some lotion my skin feels a little better. It's always a good idea to moisturize after exfoliating. I'll probably use this twice a week. Not sure I would use this before going to bed though, my irritated skin definitely wasn't helping me fall asleep. It is a large, rectangular shape, dries quickly, feels durable, and hopefully will last a long time. I would recommend this. People with very sensitive skin might want to look for something a little softer though.

rating 5.0. Love these - so will you! I received these Beauty skin bath wash cloth/towels in on time and without any damage. I just happened to stumble onto these gems. I ordered the three pack so I could give one to my husband and sister. My husband was like, What - you want me to do What? I am pretty sure he maybe
over it for good already though he has used three times but that was because I made him so he could help me with this review. Again he was like
What? Ok I really think he is all over it now. I will wash it up now and keep it for me, why? Because I love it!!!!! Yes in deed this is a keeper and I implore you to buy these because you will also love them.
I am not sure if you get to pick what color you get when you order only one but when you order the three pack you get one of each color. NO, the colors do not mean anything other than they are a particular color that is all.
What I do when I use these wash cloths is I get in the shower and stand as long as I can in the hot water and changing from front to back. You can also take a hot bath but I am a shower kind of girl so that was the option I used. Once your skin is nice and hot take your wash cloth and put some soap on your cloth keeping in mind when you do that you will not need to use as much because this cloth lathers up A LOT. Now for this part and I am sure you are wonder why this cloth is so long well you are now going to find out. With one had grab one end of the cloth and with the other hand take the other end of the cloth use it like you were shining you shoes. The harder you do this the better the results. It will make your skin really soft. Now some of the reviews have said that even though they thought they were clean that while using this really big wash cloth that lots of dead skin came off, and they said it was gross because it left a really dirty tub. Maybe I didn't get and dead skin off because I took a shower instead of a bath I don't now without taking a bath, but my skin was really soft. From some of the reviews they said to make sure that the wash cloths you get come from Japan and not from China because they said those were not any good. I don't know that for sure but I thought I should at least warn you what others are saying just in case they are right. I was mine every couple days because I rinse and wash with soap in the shower. I also I rewash myself to make sure all those dirty cells are off me. These should last for a while and can be used until they get soft and are not scratchy anymore.
I bought these with my own money no discount for me, I love them and so will you. If you wouldn't mind if you found any part of this review helpful would you mind helping me out by hitting the yes button below. Thanks!

rating 3.0. Excellent service. So so product. The price was right. The service was excellent. I received the product within three days of placing my order. The product was okay. It's moisturizing, but it stings. I thought the stinging would lessen with use, but it didn't. I'm not a wimp and can usually tolerate some discomfort, but the stinging/burning from this product I found very unpleasant. I had hoped to see some improvement on wrinkles, especially on the drivers side of my face, but I noticed none.
rating 5.0. can't live without this This is a great product, that helps with wrinkles and also has helped me with scars. My 13yr old daughter loves this product too.

rating 5.0. A great exfoliant! I saw a difference after 2 applications!  My only criticism is the jar packaging.  Exposure to air tends to destroy antioxidants; tube packaging would have made this a superior product.  But, that aside, it wears beautifully under makeup during the day and mingles nicely with my moisturizer and antioxidant oil at bedtime.  It's non irritating despite it's high Glycolic content.
rating 1.0. not for dry skin I have extremely dry skin, and some eczema. My face broke out after use, and left dark spots.  I did continue to use their face wash that did not irritate my skin.

rating 5.0. love!!! i love this stuff!!!!! i get so many compliments on my skin and it has mostly to do with this product. if i get break-outs, they heal within 2 days as opposed to a week. it can dry skin out if you're sensitive, but once your skin is used to it, you will glow!

rating 4.0. I suppose I could live without this product, but I wouldn't want to... So, I wanted to wait a week before I posted my review. I felt that would be enough time to see some minimal effects, and see how my skin reacted to the product.

Well, as the product warned and from reading other reviews, it did sting a little after application. However, I have used AHA products before and have done glycolic peels, so I wasn't bothered or surprised by it.

By the fifth day, the stinging was only felt around my nose, and probably because I tend to have a heavy hand with any products I use.

Well, I don't really have wrinkles. I'm in my early 30s, but people always ask me if I'm in my 20s. My mom and grandmother also look quite young for their ages, so I may have some good genes...

But, that doesn't mean I won't try to do what I can (within my budget) to keep my skin looking the best it can. I have some old acne scars from years ago. I have done $800 peels with a dermatologist and such in the past and I didn't notice life-changing results. Well, this product seems to make my skin look softer, and it gives it a glow it doesn't have when I don't use it.

After using it for a week, I find that I like it a lot. I actually look forward to washing my face and putting in on. I just ordered the face wash today because I like this product so much. I have some freckles on my nose and those look like they are fading. I'm going to keep using this product. The price is right, and I feel my results will continue to improve.

rating 5.0. Alpha Hydrox I love the way my face looks.  I am a 60 year old and thought I needed a Face lift.  The more I use this product - the better I feel about myself.  [[ASIN:B000G8LWZI Alpha Hydrox 12% Glycolic AHA Souffle-1.6 oz]]

rating 5.0. Non greasy, non irratating, and makes my skin look smooth. I have been using this product for more than a year now and it is a regular to my beauty routine. I wash my face at night, put on a eye moisturizer, and than put this product on my face. Remember to wash your hands when your done, bc this product can stain your towels and pillow case. I started using this product with a lower AHA level and then moved up to this % when I thought my skin could handle it (sometimes my combo skin can be sensitive). My skin looks healthy with a glow in the morning, and I believe better in the morning than at night bc of this product. I recommend this product to someone looking for smoother skin without grease or irritation.

rating 5.0. Highly recommended. Even though this is advertised for fine lines, I use it for acne (because of its high AHA content).  It clears skin up within 6 weeks and evens out tone.  I'm not wasting my money on anything else now that I know this product is out there, and is very affordable.

rating 5.0. Best antiaging product I have used AHA and Retin A for anti-aging/wrinkle prevention for 15 years. This product with the addition of 12% glycolic acid is fabulous. I love it! I've stopped using the Retin A since I started this product 10 mos ago. It doesn't dry my skin or cause peeling like the Retin A does and it really makes the fine lines disappear.

rating 5.0. A GREAT moisturizer! I read the reviews about this product and decided to go ahead and buy it. I have been using it for a week, only at night and my skin just glows. I have had no adverse reaction like others though I have problem skin, I still break out, so I think this will help my skin a lot. Its not greasy, very light and one needs very little. The tube is easy to carry for traveling. I normally do not write reviews so soon but I can already tell the difference it has made to my skin and I am very happy.

rating 5.0. Works pretty good at rosacea, too One of my friends have the skin condition called rosacea. I read AHA lessens the symptoms of it and immedeately bought this cream for her. It really does work as a symptomatic solution.

rating 5.0. Terrific! - Beware of packaging I am in my late 30s with fair skin and adult onset acne. I have started using the souffle about three months ago and have seen great results in not only significant reduction of break outs, but also in the way old scars and spots fade and become less visible. I should say that this product does take a couple of weeks to get used to as it did leave my skin stinging just slightly after application at first and I did see some redness. However, as the instruction leaflet says these do go away. Some people may find it helpful to use every other day at first, which is what I did. I now use the face wash from this line and the lotion which I use on my body every now and then, not daily. I do see that my skin looks brighter and more radiant. I am very happy with having finally found a product that works. Just do not forget to use a sunscreen!

UPD: The product no longer comes packaged as described. I attempted to receive what's pictured twice, and had to return it twice. The souffle used to come in a JAR, but only comes in a TUBE now. For those who don't like creams in a tube (I don't because a lot more of it is wasted as it is impossible to squeeze out exact amounts and pointless to get whatever little is left when the tube is almost empty) this is a point to consider. Amazon needs t change product description and picture. Switching to 10% cream from this line as it is available in a jar.
rating 5.0. Five Stars It feels nice when I put it on, but the wrinkles are still with me.

rating 5.0. Does what it should. This is excellent for getting dead skin off of your face. It works really well - I like to put it on in the AM and then follow with Retin-A in the PM after washing my face before bed. It works wonders for discoloration or retinoid-induced flaking.

rating 5.0. Difference was immediately visible While this product came highly recommended, I wasn't expecting to wake up the first morning after using it and see a dramatic improvement in the texture of my skin. But that is what happened. I have some mild acne (close comedones) and have been fighting stubborn fine lines on my forehead, and both looked miles better. My skin was smooth and firm and beautiful. I was not sure if starting with such a high percentage of AHA would cause irritation, but I have not had any issues. I have been using it for about a week now and my skin consistently looks beautiful. I'm really pleased by the results, especially considering the price of the product.

rating 5.0. miracle product, love it I don't know how I didn't know about this product before. I have had acne for 10 years now and like most people with this problem, I tried countless product and I spent a lot of money. Sometimes I find something that works for a while and my face would clear up and then it stops working. Then I became allergic to Benzoyl Peroxide and salicylic acid doesn't work anymore. Any one who suffers from this problem knows what it feels like, when you look like crap, you feel like crap. I was so depressed. I spent a lot of time online looking for a solution and few months ago I read about glycolic acid. I went to Amazon right away and saw this product. I read the reviews and I bought it 2 months ago. I wanted to use it for a while before writing a review. Some reviewers wrote that they saw results in a few days, I thought that is not possible, but they are right. The first night I used it, when I look in the mirror the next morning my face looked so much better. Every morning I would look in the mirror and be amazed at how good my face look. I have not had anymore zits since I started using this product. And my skin is more even toned. I have very dry, sensitive skin but that is not a problem, I use moisturizer. My friend saw me the other day and ask what I am using because my face look so smooth. She made me order one for her. OMG I am so happy I found this product, I will never stop using it, I hope it keeps working. I feel so much better and I have one less thing to worry about.

rating 5.0. Only a week and my skin is FABULOUS! I've only been using this product for a little over a week and can already see a marked difference in the condition of my skin.  I am in my upper 20's with combination skin, large pores on my nose and on the apples of my cheeks, and am prone to adult acne.  I'm starting to see very slight laugh lines and a few lines between my eyebrows.  After just a week, my skin is smoother, my pores are refined, and my fine lines are diminishing.  ONE WEEK!  My skin has not broken out and purged yet as others have warned.  My acne scars have faded.  My skin is not oily nor dry when using this product and I have not had any sensitivity issues (I usually have sensitive skin).  This has been a miracle product!  I have been using it morning and night after cleansing, and have no problems applying makeup over it as it absorbs well into the skin.  A little bit goes a long way.  If you're looking to try a glycolic acid product for minor resurfacing, this is a great place to start.  It's an excellent product for the price!

rating 5.0. Excellent for gel nail application also I used these to create a set of gel nails. I followed a tutorial on YouTube by JapanNailsandMore. I don't know her real name, but she's an experienced nail technician and cosmetologist who does great tutorial videos on YouTube. These forms are great for gel nail application, using clear builder gel (either non-soak off or soak-off) by IBD, and a UV light. You brush a small amount of the gel into the form and cure it on its own under the UV lamp for about 30 seconds, and then take it out. Then you brush more gel into the form and make sure it sticks to the sidewalls. You then place it over your finger and hold your finger under the lamp. You must hold the form down with another finger so as to prevent bubbling, at least for the first 10 seconds, then you can let go and let the lamp cure it for 2 minutes total. Once the lamp is turned off, remove your finger from the UV lamp and then pop the form off. It comes right off and the nail is PERFECT! So much easier than doing the sculptured nail forms. I am SOLD! Will never be without these again.

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Perfect Nails This is the one of the best products for those that do their own nails at home and are not very good with applying acrylic freestyle.  Just mix your acrylic onto the brush and pat it into the nail form, once that is done, turn the form over and press it onto your own nail and hold.  Scrap any access of from sides, wait approx. 3 mins. until acrylic hardens, then pull the form off.  You will have a beautiful smooth acrylic nail and all that is left to do is just file the sides to shape the way you want.  Love, Love this product.

input: rating 5.0. The Japanese know how to bathe These wash cloths are wonderful.  You feel so clean after using one.  Everything squeaks and all the dead skin is down the drain.  I highly recommend.  (I give these as *small* gifts to people I really care about.)
rating 2.0. Not my thing To bulky. Wish I hadn't bothered. But probably fits the purpose. My own fault for buying - no real purpose in my world. A little too rough for me to exfoliate.

rating 5.0. Not just for ladies. Great for travel and camping. I purchased these Japanese Wash cloth to remove dry skin and prevent ingrown hairs after epilating. They leave my skin smooth and flake free. I use it folded to wash my entire body and then stretch it out to wash my back. The material provides the perfect amount of scrubbing sensation.

The cloth can be used on the face but only with a very light hand.

My husband, who is a mechanic, uses one to bathe each night as well. The scrubbing action cleans away grease and grime easier than a regular terry cloth. And after several months of use, his cloth shows no signs of staining the way terry cloth would.

The cloth dries very quickly, making it great for carrying while traveling and especially when camping.

When these wear out, I will certainly buy more.
rating 5.0. Great for the shower Received one of these years ago and needed to replace it - These are great shower clothes that make washing your back easy and they dry fast

rating 5.0. This reminds me, I need to order a couple more... I get pretty dirty working on diesel engines, and these work so much better than a cotton washcloth for getting the grease off. What used to require Dawn dish detergent and vigorous scrubbing now requires a simple bar of soap and a couple light rubs with the Salux. Just don't get them on of your more "sensitive areas," because it's not a nice feeling!

rating 5.0. Haven't been this clean or smooth since I was a baby This thing is amazing. I have dry skin and all too often after taking a shower I will dry myself off (a bit rough) with my towel and still see a lot of dirt/skin coming off the towel. I tried using exfoliants and other body scrubs which worked at varying levels but in general ended up costing a lot of money.

I visited a Korean spa and heard of the body scrub that they offered and did some research about what they used. I then purchased the “Exfoliating Scrub Bath Mitten” from Amazon since it was what a lot of these spas were using. However, I found it terrible largely because its so small and makes it hard to actually scrub anything. I can see it working for a child but not for a grown man.

I gave up for a year until Amazon recommendations ( THANK YOU) brought this product to my attention. All I can say that this is a god send. Its large, easy to maneuver and rough but not too rough on my skin. I never felt so clean after using it. It also lathers body wash very well so only a tea spoon amount is needed for me to give my entire body a proper cleaning. As an added bonus its large enough to grab both ends and do a see saw motion on my back to scrub my back which I can say is probably the most neglected cleaning area on my body. Overall a great purchase. I’m worried that this product might be discontinued so I may stock up on it in the future. I would also say this come in a pack of 3 and I’ve being use a single 1 for 6 months and I feel that its still very effective.

rating 5.0. Great Suds, Quick Dry I have used these for years, and I can't say enough about how much I love them. The rough suface creates lots of rich lather from all types of soap or bath gel, and the long length lets you reach everywhere to exfoliate easily. Nylon fabric rinses clean easily and dries quickly. These are excellent for travel -- just roll up in a zip-lock baggie.

rating 5.0. The only exfoliating towels my wife will use, good enough to clean a manly man too These are really pretty nice, i use them every now and then, but my wife will use nothing else.

Pros:

- dry quickly
- very good exfoliating / cleaning properties - I do a lot of outdoorsy work, and this will really get the dirt out !
- don't get moldy or nasty like some of the "sponge" versions do - the towel form is the way to go
- Last for probably 4+ months each, one 3-pack is good enough for a year
- My wife will use nothing else, these are the jam!

Cons: none come to mind
rating 1.0. Exfoliating beyond expected Very rough and irritating; not as expected. Use cautiously.
rating 5.0. Five Stars Excellent Product. I love it.

rating 5.0. Silky Skin Again! I have my silky skin back, thank you Salux and thank you Mighty Gadgets storefront.  This cloth really gets the job done and dries fast.  Guess what? It is also excellent to use as a back scratcher! No more 1 inch wide back scratcher, trying to get the 'job' done!  I did have a problem with my order not showing up, however.  I contacted the storefront and was met with the fastest response.  Mighty Gadgets went up and beyond the call of duty to make this customer happy.  They were delightful to deal with and I would not hesitate to do business with them, again.  Thank you Mighty Gadgets for making me one happy lady. Your generosity is deeply appreciated!

rating 5.0. Fantastic Find I read about these cloths on Makeupalley where they are nearly universally praised. After reading the reviews there, I bought one on eBay about a year ago. Before using the Salux cloth, I typically used poofs or one of those scrubby washcloths that are sold at Wal-Mart. Neither can compare to these cloths!

The first time I used this cloth, it felt a bit harsh because I wasn't quite used to it. After the second day, my skin had adjusted and I've since never felt even slightly uncomfortable when using it. It is tough enjoy to really get read of the dead skin on your body without feeling like you're washing with a piece of sandpaper. It works beautifully with just about every cleanser or soap you use. Unlike some cloths, you don't have to use a huge amount of product to get a good lather. They're also long enough to use when washing your back which eliminates the need for a back brush. These cloths also last forever and a day. The one I bought last year was still in good condition but I was forced to buy another one after my cat decided to steal it out of my shower and use it as a toy. You can typically find a pack of three for under $10 on various sites and, if you're lucky, you can find them at Japanese stores for $1 or two.

Overall, these cloths are a fantastic find as they are long lasting and reasonably priced.

rating 3.0. UPDATE! Amount of Hair Back! UPDATE! The Shrinking Packages of hair

BEFORE
In my last review, I commented that at the beginning, I was pleased with the price and that the amount of hair matched the pictures. Over time however, I found that:
1) the packaging changed from “factory original “ (like the clear plastic sleeves like you see braids come in) to ziplock bags (like you put your kid’s lunch in). Not cool, but not bad.
2) After the packaging change, I started to notice that each time I bought the hair, there was less and less hair in the little ziplock baggies. Definitely NOT cool and super BAD :-/

NOW!!!
Flyteng responded my review by suggesting I give them another try (no extra hair or admission of the skimping however). I did because the price was still great at a bit over 15 bucks and my hair did look really cute (for a little while at least- more later).

For the last three purchases, there has been more hair in the bags. V. Cool. Still in ziplocks though. Ratchet. The price has gone up close to 3 bucks, but at least the the amounts of hair are more consistent.

The Hair
It looks beautiful and natural for about a week. It’s soft and feels light and great. Something happens into the second week however and the hair starts to get hard and really nappy. Now full disclosure: when I install, I pull a lot of the coils apart. When I do this, it looks absolutely natural (I joined a Black Girl Magic Meet up - they ALL that it was mine and you know we know). Since I don’t mind nappy hair, it’s cool. I do have to cut the matted ends daily to not look like I haven’t been lost in the desert for a month, but again, I’m cool with that.

All in all, I would say that I will continue to use it as long as:
1) the price doesn’t continue to go up (might have to do with China tariffs - anybody else feeling this our hair products?).
2) they don’t start back skimping on the hair.

Happy Crocheting Y’all!!
Miss Bliss

rating 5.0. This product is amazing, and worth every cent This product is amazing, and worth every cent. To put this into context, I live in Southern California and we experience high heat and high humidity.

- Makeup stays put and looks fresh for 12+ hours WITHOUT any touch up
- Makeup adheres better to skin - I ended up using less foundation, bronzer, and highlighter. This primer ENHANCES color payoff in other products
- Primer does not feel thick or uncomfortable on the skin throughout the day

Only issue: this product dries very quickly to a tacky texture. I got the best results when I applied moisturizer before the primer. After the primer dries, liquid foundation should be applied with a very quick hand. Otherwise, the foundation will begin to collect unevenly in blotches. You can apply liquid foundation by hand or brush, but the best method is probably stippling with a brush or beauty blender. Stippling will prevent the foundation from sticking to the primer in blotches

it truly makes your make up stick to your skin and doesn't melt off on the hottest of days. i wore this to a concert festival during the summer and by the end of it, my face wasn't melted and oily.

cons:
taking the fact that it's for high-performance conditions, i would NOT recommend anyone to use this daily. i wore this twice on separate occasions because i couldn't find a primer that really worked at the time (update: found a product that works amazingly and can be used everyday--MAKE UP FOR EVER Step 1 Skin Equalizer) what ended up happening after i used it, probably 1-2 days after was that my face broke out in large pimples as well as a weird rash on my cheeks. this is just my personal experience, but i would not use it again. my skin did not react kindly to this and my poor clogged pores were probably suffocating under it. so if you must, use with caution!

tips:
apply this LAST, after any other creams, lotions, sunscreen. i made the mistake of applying it before my sunscreen and it became flaky and i had to wipe off crumbs from my face.

rating 5.0. This is pure perfection! This stuff is great. I was worried it would create streaks or clumpy spots because of what one review said but after eyeing this for months, I finally took a chance & I was not disappointed at all. I just put some on a cotton pad & dabbed (NOT RUBBED) all over my face & it did not create any visible marks or rough spots when I applied my makeup. A little goes a long way & it really does stay on until you take off your makeup. I sweat so much that I have stopped wearing makeup just because I sweat it all off within an hour but my makeup stayed on literally until I had to take it off for bed. I have never been more happy with a purchase. It is such good quality. Just handling the bottle, you can tell it is made well & is of good quality. It looks & performs as something that should be priced really high but it was so affordable I was blown away by how great it is. Another great thing about this is that it makes your makeup go a loonngg way. In fact, I was so use to my makeup smearing so easily and thinly that I didn't notice that this made it spread harder just because it keeps it from smearing (thats its purpose) so thats great haha but I have to make sure to evenly shade my face to my neck next time. All in all, not one bad thing about this. I never thought something could do what this does. Oh & some people mentioned that it makes them break out but it actually cleared my skin up a lot just because it dried out all the spots on my face. It's great!!!!

rating 5.0. YES!!!!! Ladies! If you are doing gel manicures at home or are just trying to remove them at home, this is an amazing alternate to soaking them! It does make my nails feel a little weird, almost like they are hardening, but you can see the gel start bubbling right off! When I have been impatient, I have started picking it before it has gone all the way through so then I just apply a little more and wait a few more minutes. rating 4.0. It actually works First and most importantly: it does work. rating 5.0. Great for larger nail plate damage! This was my first time using silk wraps and I was using them for a slightly more complicated purpose; instead of just dealing with a crack in the nail, I have a full portion of my nail plate that broke off due to damage at my nail matrix. I wanted an easy way to keep my nails clean, dry and safe during the healing and regrowth process and decided to go with these. This is literally just a sheet of pure silk, and while I read that the tabbed ones are easier to use because they're already shaped and self-adhesive, I really wanted to have more control over it given my situation. This works extremely well with glue, and in addition to that, once filed down to be completely even, it's like a freshly buffed nail - however, in texture only. It does not necessarily look natural on its own. It provided me with a really solid foundation, and I was able to cover it with gel polish afterward. Now, the place where my nail bed was previously exposed is completely protected as well as feeling just as hard as my actual nail. It looks completely natural and normal and it makes me feel a lot better about having such a big part of my nail bed missing.

rating 5.0. Great nail repair I have used this product in the past and it is the best way I know to mend a broken nail.  The long strip of silk (as opposed to the product) makes this much more economical as you cut only what you need.  Just cut you little piece of silk, hold it on your nail and drop a tiny bit off crazy glue on.  I sometimes hold down edges with a little clamp, if necessary.  You can then smoothe the edges with an every board and polish as usual.  It actually could stay on for a couple of weeks, thru hand washing, housecleaning, gardening.  It never feels like the nail had ever been broken.  And it breaths so your nail underneath doesn't get dried out.

input: rating 5.0. Smells great, works great Smells great, works great, makes my hair feel great, just great overall. Cleared up my dry scalp and really started to repair damage to my hair once I started to use it. I have had such trouble finding a good system that makes my hair happy, I'm pleased I found this. Try it if you have had problems in the past with hair products, you will be pleasantly surprised. One complaint, the pump is a little cheesy and doesn't dispense as much as I need to use. It also takes a much longer time to reprise the pump because the product is thick, but that is an issue with packaging and not the product. The product is fantastic.

rating 1.0. WHAT A MISTAKE AND WASTE OF $$$ I purchased this to replace my WEN which I have been using for about 5-6 years. I won't get into WEN (which I still LOVE despite...)
This is what I came up with when researching WEN alternatives. Leaves your hair "stringy and crispy" for lack of a better term. Not soft AT ALL!!!
Washes away hair dye as well. Using Suave which is $3 for a fam size bottle at Wlmrt is a better buy than this. Loss just as much hair and didn't seem to do much. Will never purchase again and will NOT recommend!

rating 5.0. If you're looking for a sulfate free shampoo look no further!! This is my go-to shampoo, I've purchased it twice and love it. I use much more than the "recommeded" amount and still the bottle lasts 6 months at least (I have medium/long thick hair). I've found my use of conditioner has diminished to maybe one a month with having switched to this product.
rating 1.0. One Star it was opened and the shampoo was leaking

rating 5.0. An Honestly Cruelty Free Hair Treat! This shampoo is brilliant! (Bought & used it with the Art Naturals Argan Hair Mask afterwards.) I have fine, thin, color treated hair & wanted a cruelty free, NO animal testing, phosphate free product. I am thrilled at the experience. No drying brittle effect, nice moisturizing feeling with an actual total cleanse of my hair. And any product that gives me that "swing" in my hair is a miracle cure, as my hair is baby fine & always full of static & very fly-away.  I am totally hooked! You can't go wrong trying this Pure Body Naturals product. (Unexpected side effect: the aroma is AMAZING! I have had multiple folks wiggle their nose & ask about my shampoo because of the aroma.  I can't do it justice, it's a nutty, natural smell that has an unexpected aromatherapeutic benefit. This wouldn't make me buy a product, but as an added surprise it's lovely!) I have already ordered a second bottle for our second bathroom.  You need so little it will last a while, but my whole household wants to use it now so we are all stocking up! Gets my best rating because the price is the last gift. Salon products 4x the cost don't leave such lovely hair! But for less than $15 bucks you can look, feel (& smell!) your best at home without a Salon professional.

rating 1.0. The packing was awful, and the pump does not work. It is really hard to tell since it came encased in protective plastic which was coated with a significant amount of leaked shampoo.  After I got it out of the gooey plastic bag, washed off the bottle, I then inserted the pump.  Guess what, it didn't work, no matter what I did. However, the shampoo began to form around the base of the head of the pump, charming.  It was a discouraging shampoo to say the least.  I ended up using another product, whose pump worked. It was a waste of $10.50!!!!  Even though I posted a review, the company emailed 2 or 3 times, anxious to here what I had to say.  I told them the very same thing I said here.  So......they offered me a coupon for my next order.  I had made it clear that I wouldn't be trying it again.  One time in the shower, washing long, tightly curled hair was enough of a bad experience for me.  So then they told me the coupon was good for 6 months......interesting, since I don't need to deal with this now or six months from now.  It remains a waste of $10.50!  They also blamed the packaging on Amazon, a tad tacky.

rating 2.0. Not impressed. My hair type: naturally curly. Medium thickness/density. Medium/long length. Very fluffy i use no hair products. I usually blow dry it straight after a wash and it lasts for several days before I need to wash it again.

PROS:
- Smells nice. Smells like the essential oils. It's very subtle, not perfumey at all, and really I can't even smell it after my hair is dry.
- Gentle. It does not irritate my scalp
- Cleared up my dandruff/scalp rash from my previous shampoo that irritated my scalp and I was always itchy.
- Cleans well. Some natural shampoos don't seem to remove all natural oils or hair products, but this one does.
- Even without conditioner, I can get a comb through my hair. Not something I can say about most shampoos.

CONS:
- Still need conditioner. I thought with all the oils are nourishing that I wouldn't need a conditioner, but I do.
- My hair gets oily faster. When using this, I need to wash my hair more often. I used to get 4 days out of wash and now I barely get two since switching to this.
- My hair is extremely static-y! It doesn't matter how much conditioner, leave-ins or serums I apply, I cannot get the static to go away. I didn't have this problem before this shampoo.
- Price. It doesn't do anything for me that I can't get from a cheaper shampoo.

OVERALL: The fact that may hair gets greasy fast and and that it's so static-y tells me my hair is too dry. I need a moisturizing shampoo. When my hair/scalp is properly moisturized, it doesn't get greasy and I don't get flyaways. I thought this was a moisturizing shampoo with all the oils in it, but I guess they all just get rinsed away, and then some. I will not buy this again because I cannot stand static-y hair.
