rating 1.0. Disappointed that the product is not what I expected from previous orders I purchased this previously and loved it. It was a 16oz pump bottle with a minimum of ingredients and Argan Oil was listed as the second ingredient. In Feb 2020, the last time I ordered it, this is what I received.

I clicked on "Buy Again". What I received is half as much - an 8oz bottle with significantly different ingredients, no pump bottle, and argan oil is like the 10th or 11th item listed in the ingredients. Also, it has quite a strong smell to it. So, I decided to return it.

So, I didn't use it so I cannot comment on this product. However, I think the company should have been more careful about this "product switch" so we don't have to go through the trouble of returning a product that is different than previously sold.

rating 2.0. Leaves my hair with dandruff and frizz I purchased this because I wanted to try a different Argan shampoo. I'm afraid that the only thing that I like about this product is the smell. It doesn't move through my hair, so I end up adding more product to get all of my hair, and yes I make sure to rinse all the extra out. It cleans my hair, but has also left me with dandruff and surprisingly since it's an argan oil shampoo, my hair is frizzy. My husband also tried it and by the end of his work day his hair needs to be washed again, and he doesn't work in a strenuous environment. I will not be purchasing again.

rating 3.0. MOSTLY HYPE Okay REAL TALK , SO I too wanted the perfect shampoo to buy to make my hair feel nice. I didn't care that this bottle was $15 or that it was only a shampoo with no matching conditioner(which is a problem) . So I ordered it and got into the argan oil rage. BUT it first arrived and it was in a little clear plastic bag that looked cheap and made me feel like , if your an expensive nice salon quality shampoo that's not cheap then present it a little better! Also the amount your suppose to use its a dime size and the amount that was splattered all over was many dime sizes... So a lot of times I could have used it gone! You need to package this better not a clear bag with a cheap zip tie. But that wasn't even the disappointing part. I used it on my brown medium length pretty thick hair, (my hair is usually straight not a problem and dries nice ) and I used it and it doesn't lather, which is fine I like that it has no sulfates but I also used naturals argan conditioner from another brand. So I used both together and my hair felt good . It felt FINE it looked normal and not anything better then my sulfate free loreal moisturizing shampoo for $5. So I had the same result, I recommend everyone get that. This is a hype "luxury" product because yes it has pros and it made my hair feel good but it's not worth $15 and definitely nothing was luxurious about it expect the price. My sulfate free loreal deep moisturizing shampoo and conditioner even feels a little better then using this , for 1/3 of the cost. So yes it works and feels good but MOSTLY HYPE AND OVERPRICED

input: rating 5.0. Great brush--buy it! I have tried a lot of bath brushes, and this one's the best. Unlike other reviewers, I don't want one that will scratch all of my skin off when I use it; rather, I like a brush that does its job but is moderately soft. The side of the brush that's good for massage doesn't really work for me except on my feet, and it's awesome for that.

rating 1.0. I Finally Found Quality This is the best bath brush I ever owned. I've tried a few others but honestly everything about this one is exactly as the description states. The bristles are soft to your skin, not like others that can be harsh. The flip side is a massage and it does the job just fine. I'm very picky with what I buy, you won't be disappointed.

rating 2.0. Short lifespan I originally gave this 5 stars, because it used to be wonderful.

Unfortunately, within 6 months, the bristles started to soften, and within 10 months of my hanging it between uses, the wood at the head of the brush had darkened and split. I hate to say this, but maybe I'd have been better off with a crummy plastic shower brush, because at l wouldn't have paid so much.

rating 5.0. Well Made Well made.  Though I know that this is subjective, the bristle stiffness is perfect to my needs:  not so stiff that they feel like they're scraping off your skin but firm enough to give and invigorated, clean feel.  Nice solid handle

rating 4.0. Solid bang for your buck So far so good.  I've only owned this bath brush for a couple of weeks, but it's hold up well thus far.  The wood beads don't feel like they are actually made of wood (although I might be mistaken) and the entire "massage" side of it seems kind of odd/useless to me, but that's not what I bought it for anyway so it's not a big deal.  The one notable thing I can think of to mention is that, out of the box, the bristles are quite stiff and coarse.  If you just get the brush wet and try to use it, you'll find that it's pretty rough on your back.  However, if you soak it thoroughly and massage the bristles under comfortably hot water with your hands for a couple of minutes, they soften up nicely and hold a good lather, and they will stay that way from then on without scratching the living daylights out of your back. 4/5 stars.  Will re-review should I change my mind.
rating 3.0. I'm satisfied with the brush I'm satisfied with the brush, but the product explanation on the box was very wierd, i.e., the product's TASTE would improve with use.
rating 4.0. Good. I wish it had a curved handle to ... Good.  I wish it had a curved handle to make reaching the back easier, but otherwise it is fine.

rating 5.0. Well worth it. Excellent scrubber. Nice bristle action on skin. Reaches all those hard to get places on back. I am 6' 2". So that length works well.
I have had no bristle fall out nor unpleasant aroma, despite the manufacturer's precautions. I shake it about three times after daily usage and it gets the remaining excess water out and dries without mold. It helps to clean your bathing area with vinegar as mold, mildew hate that.

rating 5.0. Very satisfied Shoulder surgeries have necessitated the use of a back brush in the shower.  A previous mesh-type brush worked fine for less than six months before the mesh head unraveled, rendering it useless.  Have been using this brush for a week and am very satisfied.  Bristles initially felt rough compared to previous mesh but after several uses they seem to have softened slightly and I have adjusted to the new design.  Bristles hold soap well and definitely do a better job of cleaning/exfoliating skin than mesh.  Handle is long enough to reach entire back (I'm six foot tall) and offers a secure grip when wet or soapy.  I don't anticipate having to replace this brush any time soon.

rating 5.0. Calling all lip lovers! I love these for freelancing as an artist, but I also love using them on myself. More and more I'm starting to use throw away applicators to help preserve my own products. I wear makeup every single day (I'm talking full face makeup) so my makeup has more of an opportunity to harbor bacteria (constantly using, opening and closing products, using my hands to apply products and putting my hands in the products themselves, etc.). I love these because #1 I can use any lip product down to the bone. You know when your lipstick looks like it's all gone because it doesn't twist up anymore? Well girrrrl, there is still a good amount of product left in that tube. Using an applicator like this allows you to get deep down into the tube and use that $17 MAC lipstick to the bare bone. #2 I love using these with glosses. I wear lipliner, lipstick, and gloss almost every day. But when I start to put a gloss over my lipstick, sometimes the gloss picks up the lipstick and starts to change the color of my gloss. I use these directly in the gloss tube or  liquid lipstick. Another way to apply is by using the gloss applicator to put a little product on the back of your hand or on a palette, and then picking up the product with these applicators. These are also great for mixing colors on the back of your hand or on a palette. Not that it matters, but I like the variety of colors you get too :D

rating 5.0. Non-Toxic I know this product to be safe, non-toxic and have no serious ingredient concerns. However, after I purchased, I saw that the ingredients listed under the description had carcinogens, so I worried I'd be receiving an old formulation of the face stick that had all these toxic ingredients. Thankfully, I received the new formulation with no Red-40 or parabens, which were a part of the old formulation. If you read the ingredients list and saw the parabens and decided not to buy, don't fret they just haven't updated the ingredients list on Amazon. You'll be receiving a safe product. I would recommend.

Unfortunately, it's a small size, but most face sticks I've seen are less than an ounce like this one anyway, and are triple the price. Since they don't carry this in a store near me, I'm glad Amazon carries it at a not too inflated price. I've read this can be purchased for a dollar, but I've never found it in a store, so I'm glad I found it here for $5, which is still much cheaper than other brands.

If you have dry skin like me, go for a stick blush like this one! The shimmer is barely noticeable it's more like a glow of health that it gives. This is the pink lemonade color, and I can't wait to try persimmon.

input: rating 5.0. Great moisturizer I love this moisturizer! Even though I have not used it very long (about one week) the consistency and the fragrance are both great. It moisturizes my skin beautifully without feeling heavy or greasy. I have previously been afraid to use moisturizers because I thought they would break me out. However, as I am getting to an age where moisturizers are important I decided to try this one. Yay! No breakouts. My skin just feels very very smooth and comfortable after using this product. I have a lot of faith in Instanatural products. I feel their ingredients are natural and I know how to pronounce them which is always a good thing. Keep up the good work.

rating 5.0. This is my second bottle ( which my husband added to a gift packcage for me knowing how much i loved it) My skin is very dry I have used several high end moiturizers over the years, and by doing some research just found Insta Natural.

I got used to it.

so natural or good for you. I will try to learn more about it.
Congratulations to a company that kept it simple.
by the way:
This Company has the best customer service ever!
I could not believe it that following my purchase I got a personal Email, explaining the company mission, thanking me for purchasing
their product, with another Email asking if I was pleased with the purchase.

from a ex cosmetics sales manager from a great high end cosmectic company.

The two products have worked well together to reduce dark spots and rough patches on my forehead.  I also like the pump bottle which helps me control the amount of product I use. rating 3.0. PUMP BROKEN, had to pry open and transfer to another jar. Yep...these pumps are really crappy make, as I have seen with other reviews...so bad, because I would have give 5 star for the moisturizer...but now, that it has been adulterated and had to be scooped into another old container, I feel weird...

Anyway, overall, it feels greasy, thick and heavy at first, BUT do not despair, in about 2 minutes it absorbes perfectly into your skin and feels clean, moisturized and never greasy, perfect base for make up.
Somehow did make my skin look healthier, plumper, and cause absolutely no breakouts...I did noticed some blackheads and pores on my nose filling up so it is possible that the oils kind of accumulate, but right after using exfoliator, I was fine again...

would buy again, but PLEASE, fix those damn pumps...I cannot run back to the post office every time...and I will not like keeping defective product again!

UPDATE 12/21/14
Very sad to report that now I have stopped using the cream alltogether. I will post update if anything changes.
Reasons: As I have mentioned in my first review, I noticed this cream is very heavy, but absorbs very well. However over past weeks of using it, it seems it has completely blocked my pores, in a very sneaky, slow, invisible manner. The problems started when l found painful bumps between my eyebrows and on my temples and huge hard pores on my chin. I do not use hair products, so it is not from that. I am a picker, so tried to relieve these pores by extracting the blackheads, and exfoliating, in hopes it would relieve them, as well as aid in removing the deposits this moisturizer might leave during the day. I tried this for a while only to find more sneaky blackheads and whiteheads forming in places I would have never had this problem before. See, I have a skin that sometimes has outbreaks but not in the typical oily/teenager spots, but since I have started using this cream, the areas of no problems before have become breeding grounds for families of nasty, hardened pores. Unfortunately they are very hard, painful and almost impossible to remove without damage...I have stopped using the moisturizer and now will wait it out. I guess I might do better with a gel based moisturizer.

rating 2.0. Disappointing. Didn't hydrate me. Disappointed. I tried this with combination of the Vitamin C Serum and it never hydrated me.

rating 5.0. Highly Recommended! I'm a Caucasian woman in my late fifties and I bought this product several weeks ago because I liked the natural ingredients and hoped they would nourish my skin. I neglected my skin until after menopause when I became distressingly aware of how rapidly I had aged.
In the course of the past 2 yrs. I have tried numerous products and been moderately satisfied.
I LOVE this cream!
In the past several weeks fine lines and wrinkles have gradually but distinctly diminished. But even more important and incredible is that the red, blotchy areas on my cheeks and forehead have faded until they are barely noticeable! I no longer use cover up or foundation at all!
Friends and family have commented on how great I look. At the pharmacy, I was talking to another woman in line about hot flashes and she thought I was too young for menopause! OMG!!!
I highly recommend this cream.

rating 1.0. Not Good... I really wanted to like this moisturizer, but I just can't.  First of all, it smells funky - like I'm putting salad dressing on my face.  I like a lot of InstaNatural products, so I didn't want to give such a bad review, but this heavy, smelly cream just doesn't work!  Secondly, it contains beeswax, a known comedogenic ingredient that doesn't belong in a facial moisturizer. Being a skin care junkie, I would've tolerated the smell, and greasy feel if it was beneficial for my skin. However, after using it for a week with no results, and even a few minor breakouts, I tossed it in the trash.

rating 5.0. I'm very satisfied. After about 4 weeks I'm really impressed. I took a risk here. I've been using Loreal Revitalift for about 6 years. I was unsatisfied with the price of Loreal at the store and I was all out. So I bought this product. I spent slightly less overall (ounce per ounce) and the product is use for BOTH day and night.
I'm very satisfied. After about 4 weeks, I walked passed a mirror yesterday and thought "Huh, I think my skin looks firmer" I was really surprised. I would have been happy with status quo!
Admittedly the first 1-2 weeks I had a few minor break outs. (a zit here, a zit there) but that is always to be expected whenever you change product.
Also, the smell did surprise me at first. That is, I prefer NO smell, but this has a smell. At first I thought "I'll never get used to this" but I absolutely did after about 2 weeks...and now I sort of like it.
I'm really satisfied with the product and will probably get it again.

rating 5.0. Great moisturizer I am old enough to need a wrinkle remover but also old enough to know that no cream can erase deep wrinkles,  but I can still hope. It has a very pleasant fragrance that is not added artificially and it goes on light as air but really holds in the moisture. I don't usually like a sort of pump foam cream but this is so silky and light and yet effective I am a fan. I've only used it for about two weeks and I do believe that the appearance of the lines around my eyes and mouth are reduced. I live in Hawaii and have a lot of sun damage and this is very effective and soothing on my arms and chest as well. I noticed from the reviews that some people experienced some irritation but I certainly did not. All around I would highly recommend it.

rating 4.0. Not completely gone but enough to know it's getting better The downside of this product and perhaps it's because ... I've been using this product for about a month now and here are my thoughts/experiences with it:

I read the reviews beforehand about the breakouts many experienced with the product and I suspect it was because they really pumped and slathered it on - so I made sure to Not do that. I used a pea size amount (not even) on my face( one pea sized amount for the lower part of my face and another for the top part)
I experienced no breakouts whatsoever and did see a difference - a little lightening of hyperpigmentation. Not completely gone but enough to know it's getting better

The downside of this product and perhaps it's because of the way I used it, is that my face would get a bit dry minutes after applying (maybe it absorbed too quickly idk) regardless I used the same amount morning and night.

It's not a bad cream..if you have skin that's not so dry I recommend this

What I absolutely DO NOT RECOMMEND is slathering this product on your face the same way you'd slather bbq sauce on some baby back ribs - of course your pores will be clogged and you will break out

I'll be trying the night cream to see if I can get more long lasting moisture from using the same amount and do a review after using it for a good amount of time

rating 4.0. Better I don't usually wear makeup and I have never worn false lashes with the exception of the black magnetic set by a different seller I tried first. I'm fair skinned and fair haired. I usually go for a natural look if I do put on makeup. That being said I suffer from trichotillomania and rip out my natural lashes every so often. I did so again recently and was really upset with myself so thought to try a natural look false lash. Black was way too dark and brought more attention to not having my natural lashes than drawing attention away. This brown set is much better. The liner is easy to put on. It dries quickly and is easy to remove with a cleansing oil. The lashes seem to stay. I think I need more practice with the liner and may need to draw a thicker line as the ends didn't want to stay on as well. Also as someone who is new to the false lash, I am definitely aware while I'm wearing them. Hard for me to ignore. However, the brown lashes are perfect. The set that's third down from the top resemble my natural lashes pretty well and if I get better with the liner I think this will do quite nicely

rating 4.0. 2 coats - lasts about 8 hours This kit was an experiment. I look better in brown eyeliner and mascara, but only could get black magnetic lashes with black liner. (The double magnetic kind are also black). Thought this would be a good thing for me. Well . . . somewhat. The brown is exactly right for me for both the liner and the eyelashes. I used 2 coats (because umpteen places on youtube say to do that and making sure that it's a bit more dense on the inner and outer corners, too). I waited 15 minutes and then stuck the lashes on.

Just like all the others---of every ilk---they are too long. The problem, though, with magnetic lashes is that I would need to cut off the very end magnet. This leaves a rather long piece of unsupported lash band which I would then have to glue down. Hmm. And then, the affect only lasts about 8 hours. Might be good for going dancing (not me re COVID) where you get there at 9pm and leave about 2am with some time on either side for arrival and departure.

I'll probably still wear these on occasion, but I find that the plain old glue-on lashes work best if I (a) use the dark quick-dry glue and wait 10 seconds or so and (b) put the glue on my lids and then stick the lashes to it. I can wake up with these puppies still on my lids not budged. I don't though.

rating 3.0. Smells Lovely But Very Weak I bought my first two Auric Blends perfumes two years ago and was very pleased. I bought another two last summer and two more just recently. The scents are lovely and I wish I could describe them in detail, but the last four perfumes I bought are more diluted each time and I can't pick up on the depth of the fragrances. I even wrote an email to Auric Blends politely voicing concern. I understand perfume ingredients must be expensive, but "watering down" perfumes with carrier oil to make the batch more cost efficient is compromising the product. I, and I believe many of my fellow Auric Blends fans will agree, would be fine with a small price increase if it meant the perfumes could be concentrated again. I sincerely mean that, because I like this company.

The latest two I purchased are Sandalwood and Divine Opium. Sandalwood is woody and sweet. Divine Opium has similar notes to my favorite Black Opium but a little brighter. Like I said, they're so weak that the full fragrance notes are hard to pick up on, and the scent fades quickly.

rating 1.0. but this does not smell like sandalwood. It is very perfume-y - I get ... I knew that this wasn't pure sandalwood, but this does not smell like sandalwood. It is very perfume-y - I get very congested and sneeze when I wear it. This went straight into the garbage

rating 2.0. Buyer's remorse The item pictured is a light or baby blue. The item I got is a very green-blue teal. I've seen pictures others posted with their reviews, and some show the light blue pictured in the listing, and others show the deep teal as I got, so it is not a monitor issue -- we actually are getting two different colors, and apparently you are rolling the dice on which color you will get. Also, a few people wrote in their reviews that the necklace was larger than they expected. I found that strange since it was smaller than I expected. The large "stone" in the pendant is actually plastic, and looks plastic. It looks much cheaper in person than it does in the picture, and being the wrong color, I'm disappointed. But it only cost $5 and it's not worth the hassle to send back for that, so I'm keeping it, although if I could do it all over again, I wouldn't buy it, even for $5. Mine DID come with the earrings and several reviews said they did not get the earrings. It took just under 3 weeks to arrive using standard delivery, which is pretty typical coming from China.

The same for the strands that are throughout the necklace. The earrings are in a silver tone and the necklace is in a gold tone.  I thought it would be a much smaller stone, but if you look at the pictures, which I did not do and it appears others also did not do, you can see it in the pictures on a woman to get an idea of the size. This shows in the pictures and it is what you will get. I see others complaining about how cheap it is. So, do you expect Tiffany's for the 5 dollar price you paid, including shipping? This is not a high quality jewelry set, but for the price it is very good. Not what I expected, but for someone who likes larger jewelry pieces and expects about what you would get from Target jewelry, then you have a nice necklace. The earrings are worth the price alone and probably all I will wear.

rating 5.0. Love this sunscreen! I have sensitive skin and I often breakout or get rashes on my skin from sunscreen. In addition, many sunscreens are difficult to spread and leave white streaks in the skin.

This sunscreen is very smooth and easy to apply. My skin feels soft after I put it on and I have no allergy to it! It has a light tint of white but then can blend in quickly. I love love this sunscreen, I already recommended to friends and family.

rating 4.0. Great for sensitive skin but leaves white cast I liked the formula, very mild, I can put it around my eyes and no burn, it’s also waterproof.  The only downside is that it leaves pretty opaque white cast.  I will go to the beach with a streaky white face, I don’t care, unfortunately I do not live by the beach and rarely go.  I can’t wear this to the grocery store or work because the white cast is so bad, maybe if I use just a tiny bit it won’t be so obvious but then that defeats the purpose of wearing sunscreen.  Definitely not fitting for those with a darker complexion.

rating 5.0. The "HG" for Me I first learned about this sunscreen from No BS Beauty (a no-nonsense, non-sponsored skincare enthusiast on YouTube). I was looking for something with good staying power, good filters (beyond FDA archaic limits), and no scent/fragrance for both everyday and outdoor activity sun exposure.  This hits all the marks. I have maturing skin (almost 50), and use tret, so UV exposure protection is a must. I've repurchased this one throughout the year (2022). It has never failed me: long, multi-hour summer hikes, summer outdoor wedding, and now, just as an SPF make-up primer for everyday life (work, errands, etc). I would say it does leave a slight white cast on my medium-olive skin tone, but that disappears with my sheer BB cream or foundation. It leaves a not-quite matte, smooth/silky, almost powdery finish that I appreciate because, having maturing combo-skin, I cannot stand all those highly praised "dewy" sunscreens that make me look greasy moreso than "dewy."  If you're seeking "dewy," this isn't it. I wouldn't say it's matte or drying either -- it just hits the sweet spot for me. I am a bit of a skincare nerd who wants to try out lots of different sunscreens, and I have no doubt there are amazing alternatives out there, but when you find something that works? At least in my case, I end the hunt and just hit re-order. Make sure you check the seller's storefront and ratings (always recommend that when purchasing J or Kbeauty skincare products from Amazon). This one is definitely worth trying and adding to your collection!

rating 5.0. Spreads well and good water resistance This sunscreen spreads very well and gives my skin a radiant glow. I’ve been using it for a week or two and haven’t had any breakouts so far. However, I do follow a makeup removal routine every night even if I don’t put on any makeup. From this I know that this sunscreen has great water resistance because even when I wear it to a workout, it doesn’t seem to come off because I don’t feel any irritation in my eyes (like some other sunscreens).

input: rating 1.0. odaban review The Odaban did not ban perspiration or odor. I was not satisfied, like I was hoping to be. I bought this based on other reviews, and the reviews led me to believe this product is strong enough. It is not, at least for me.

rating 1.0. This product is a waste of money. Again i need an explanation from the manufacturer why this product doesn't work at all as claimed.I bought this product with high expectation but totally dissappointed.

rating 5.0. Been using for 10 years I've been using Odaban for 10 years, the stuff works great!  I can go about two weeks now in between sprays, so a bottle lasts me almost a year.  One problem with this stuff, is when the solution gets down to about 1/3 left, the spray bottle doesn't work very well, it shoots out a hard line of spray, instead of a gentle mist, I've e-mailed the company about it but they don't seem to have a fix.  Besides that, enjoy being sweat free!  Make sure you are 100% dry before putting on before you go to bed or it will burn.

rating 2.0. Be aware I started using this spray before going to bed as the instructions says, and I noticed that its working fine.BUT the itch will drive you crazy and may leave you with scratches on your armpit. Cant use it anymore because it burns the skin after a couple applications.

rating 1.0. Doesn't work at all This is my second time buying this. I thought that I didn't apply enough the 1st time. This time I used more and applied to different parts of my body. Face, hands underarms, feet, chest and etc. I did absolutely nothing. I hope that I wasn't scammed with this bottle.

rating 5.0. Works as indicated! This stuff has been by far the best stuff to stop my excess sweating. I tend to sweat a lot, even when I am not working out or hot. I have been using Odaban for years and it is great. Perfect for stopping the sweating. BUT...

DEFINITELY do as it says and do not wear it while active...only when going to bed. I have been irritated by it when I did not wash it off soon enough after waking.

Good stuff if you are tired of ruining clothes.

rating 5.0. My confidence is back! For as long as I can remember I have suffered from excessive sweating; it was eating away at my confidence and causing unnecessary stress in my life. I couldn't buy any shirts that were too tight around the underarms and forget about buying shirts/sweaters/blazers that were certain colors, like gray, green, or light blue. I would sweat through three layers if that's what I was wearing that day. I sweat during the coldest winter days as well as in the summer. No deodorant worked for me; not degree, not overnight dove sport, not certain dri, not even a prescribed hyperhydrosis deodorant prescribed to me by my doctor.

I have been using Odaban for a couple weeks now, and I was finally able to wear my green blazer in public, lift my arms, and not be sweating! I can't believe how well this works. There was a two day period of slight underarm irritation but it has passed. I have changed my shower schedule around a bit but if that's all it takes, then I'm staying with this. As long as you follow the specific directions, this will work for you. I don't even use it everyday anymore, I use it MAYBE twice a week. Spend the $10.00 because this will change your life around if you suffer from hyperhydrosis.

rating 5.0. Life changing product I went through a period in my life where literally nothing would stop me from profusely sweating from my armpits and palms. I tried prescription products, covered in saran wrap, etc. Nothing would work.

rating 5.0. Works! Everywhere! I am an RN and was interested in reading other peoples reviews of this used not just at the arm pits.

I ordered both this and Drichlor. They are essentially the same and similar price. The dif is this comes in a small squirt bottle and is only 30ml.

I think for money savings I'd just recommend buying a small squirt bottle and pouring the 75ml Drichlor into it.

Both contain the same thing.
20% aluminum chloride. Both recommend applying at night and with reduced frequency.

Both about $10 for
30ml Odaban
75ml Drichlor (2.5 times as much)

I like the spray bottle much more than the roll on however Drichlor comes as a bottle and you can add the roll on roller or just keep it as a bottle of liquid.

I have successfully used both to prevent moisture on my face, pits, and as a guy my groin! That was the main reason I wanted to try either of them. I sweat excessively at my groin. It feels gross and makes my skin raw and inflamed. This has kept me dry! Being dry has changed my comfort level big time. It works quick and effectively.

That said I will prob just keep the spray bottle and refill with less expensive Drichlor. Same results. Half the price.

rating 5.0. So happy I bought this! I take ADHD medication that makes me sweat more than I would have liked. I always wore black or always had to have a jacket on because of sweating. The clinical strength  antiperspirants barely helped. This stuff is amazing. It stung a bit the first time I used it. It wasn't painful just kind of annoying. The second time I didn't feel any stinging. I can't believe how well this stuff works. I have had absolutely no sweating. Even after I spent two hours cleaning and had been running around all day there was no underarm wetness. Shipping was extremely fast. I had been given a month shipping estimate since I am in the United States and i got it in a week.

rating 5.0. Absolutely amazing! Since the first day that I used this product it drastically reduced the amount that I would sweat, and after about a week of use my underarms were completely dry! This is amazing, I have tried so many other antiperspirants and absolutely nothing would work for me.  I would be embarrassed wearing anything that would show sweat but now i can wear anything!  If nothing else works for you give this a shot it is honestly the best money i have ever spent!! It's so simple to use just a spray or two every night before bed and I am completely sweat free!! rating 4.0. Works better than anything I've tried. UPDATE: been using this since May and I don't sweat under my arms any longer. It does itch a bit but worth it to me. I use it twice a week at night and the next day I itch some but not unbearable.

This product works IF I use it at least every 3 nights. I did have to use it four nights in a row at first to see a result. I can't go a week or two weeks like some have stated. I am not dry as a bone, but don't have soaked armpits like I did before. So I still have to be selective in my clothing choices :(

rating 5.0. very happy with the product My second bottle, very happy with the product. Not as long lasting as drysol, but also not as harsh with less burn and less dry skin. rating 5.0. Follow directions and it'll work like a charm! I suffered from hyperhydrosis throughout my teenage years. Like others, I was embarrassed to lift up my arms because of constant wet patches. I tried several clinical strength deodorants and nothing worked. This product helps tremendously! I've been using it for 3 years and it still controls my sweating, even on hot days. Like other reviewers say, you have to use it every night for the first week or longer. After it starts working then you truly only need to spray it once or twice a week. Because of this, 1 bottle lasts almost a year! BE WARNED! Do not wipe your underarms with anything before applying! I wiped with a bath towel once. It literally felt like my armpits were on fire when I was trying to sleep. Let your armpits dry naturally while you're relaxed or apply Talc powder to soak up the moisture. Make sure you spray RIGHT BEFORE you get into bed or, even better, while you're lying in bed. Only use RIGHT BEFORE BED when you're COMPLETELY DRY! Don't let the bad reviews stop you. This is definitely worth a shot if you suffer from excessive sweating! I'll purchase this until the end of time.

rating 5.0. Life Changer! An absolute life changer!  After almost totally setting my armpits on fire when using Sweat Block wipes, I found Odaban.  After using faithfully for over two years, I now only have to apply every third day.  I highly recommend using a cloth for application and dabbing it on, rather than spraying directly on the skin.  Doing so has completely eliminated any discomfort, which, again, was very minor anyway when compared to other brands.  I now stay totally dry...which really is an accomplishment, considering that I would literally have perspiration dripping down my sides while merely sitting at my desk.  Thank you Odaban!

rating 5.0. No pain, no gain, right? For probably 15 years I suffered from severe hyperhidrosis in my underarms. I did it all to try and hide it, two shirts, buying shirts based on what colors won't highlight the sweat marks, grooming of armpit hair, dozens of special anti perspirants, and doing nothing at all. Nothing worked. It could be below freezing outside and my pits would be warm and tropical while I freeze in my t-shirt.

I came across Odaban 5 or so year ago. To get right to the point, this was my cure for hyperhidrosis of the underarm. However, it was not fun.

The first time I used this, I did what I had read. Apply at night to clean underarms and use 1 pump or apply to a cotton swab and apply. If you are a female, do not shave your pits for a couple days before using this. If you are a male, I found it helpful to trim your pit hair down with a #2 trimmer guard on your clippers. Either way, make sure there no cuts or broken skin where this is being applied and that the hair is short. If there is any irritated or broken skin and you apply this, you will not be a happy camper.

This stuff just flat out burns as is. Having irritated skin will just make a bad experience even worse. So, the first night, I couldn't take it. I followed the directions word for word and after bearing with the intense burning sensation for a couple hours, I gave in and ran to the shower to wash it off. The skin in my pits was tender for a couple days and I did not apply any deodorant while I healed.

A few days later, I did the same thing again and it still burned, but I was able to tolerate it and managed to get some sleep that night. The reaction was not as bad as the first night and again, I didn't use any deodorant for the next couple days while my skin had a chance to relax. I waited a few weeks and started using deodorant again to see if there was any change and if it was worth the discomfort I had gone through.

I had some days where that were better than others, but there was a reduction in sweat occurring so I decided to keep using it. I probably used this product a total of a dozen times. The more I used it, the less painful it became, until there was none at all. I was able to use two squirts on each underarm at night and not have any more burning sensation. This whole process took several months but I have now been hyperdrosis free for the past 5 or so years and only had to buy one bottle. Yes, there was discomfort and it was not pleasant, but I am very happy with the end result after dealing with this issue for so many years in my life.

I can now wear just one shirt, a thin shirt of any color and not be embarrassed by gross wet armpits all the time. My white shirts no longer get pit stains. I am confident when in front of people and not always subconsciously terrified of constantly moist pits sweating through my attire. I hope this works for you like it worked for me because hyperhidrosis is the absolute pits.

If you found my review helpful, please help me by hitting the "yes" button.

I personally wanted something a bit more like the color in the advertised photo. Its a nice color, but it blends in with my skin tone way too much, so it ends up looking like a nude/pink color.

If that is the look you are looking for then its good or if you have a very pale/ivory complexion it might pop more.

Other than the color the product was good. It had a nice pleasant smell and didn't dry up. I actually ended up purchasing another color (Peak Rose) that was darker and I loved it!

rating 5.0. I like it! The limited lip color selection and the reviews that many of the colors are similar or very bright were the only reasons I took months to make this purchase. I have no regrets finally buying this product!

This makes it difficult for me to wear lipsticks (liquid, creamy, matte, etc,). I really like this particular formula. It has a mousse-like texture when first applied (in a thin layer). It dries down slightly and is very light on the lips, feels like nothing is there. I can use my balm over it with minimal transfer throughout the day.

I made the initial mistake of applying it like a lip gloss or liquid lipstick and ended up with goopy neon like lips! A little bit of product goes a very long ways. If you want a more intense color, I suggest thin layers and building up to your desired color. I would buy this product again.

input: rating 5.0. Great soap for shaving This is just fantastic. I loved opening it up and smelling the very masculine, subtle clean aroma of the soap. There are reviewers that say it can be hard to get a later. I don't find that to be a problem at all. I work some into my Parker silver tip badger hair brush and then get a lather up in a bowl. My only regret is not getting more than one of these. At the rate I use it, almost daily, the one puck will last at least a year. That's pretty good price/use ratio. I've tried a lot of other soaps and really like the Razo Rock but the Mitchell's will outlast all of the others. Also, the clean smell won't interfere with any aftershave or cologne you put on like some of the other scented soaps out there.

rating 4.0. Great Soap! Great soap! I've have experimented on how to get the best lather with this soap and it can be obtained by any brush and a little care and attention but this soap excels with a boar hair shaving brush. It whips up better with the boar than my Silvertip badger brush.  It's a great soap and will definitely be apart of my shave rotation.

rating 5.0. The standard that is anything but This soap is the standard by which to judge other shave soaps. This produces one of the best lathers I've ever worked with. A soap that is not on par with this soap in every conceivable category can not be called excellent.

rating 5.0. The best shaving soap for wet shaving I've been wet shaving for a few years now, trying a variety of creams and soaps.  After reading reviews, I bought a puck of Mitchell's a while back.  I'm finally on my second.  This is a very softly scented, strongly foaming, skin protecting soap.  It's not a cream or a lotion, but I find that it provides excellent protection in my shaving routine.  A single puck lasts me for 3 or 4 months, depending on how often I'm shaving.  This is the soap I'll be sticking with.
rating 5.0. Fantastic soap Good performance. Light scent. Face feels all soft and smooth after every shave. Definitely my benchmark soap I use to compare all other soaps.

rating 5.0. Classic soap with amazing post shave. MWF is amazing stuff. Very few shave soaps leave your skin feeling like 'the fat'. Some have had issues with lathering this soap in some types of water. My water is rated with hardness of 1.8 - 7.6 grains per gallon. I have no trouble lathering this soap but if your water is significantly harder, you may have different results.

The fragrance of this soap is very mild and neutral. The scent is noticeable in the lather but does not persist post shave.

MWF will be a permanent part of my shave den and I think if anyone sticks with traditional wet shaving for long enough they will end up with a puck eventually.
rating 5.0. Five Stars Lathers nicely. Definitely worth the money as it keeps me from getting razor burn.
rating 5.0. Great soap One of the best shaving soaps in existence! Lathers well, is very slick and my only complaint would be its light scent, I much prefer the heavier woodsy smells for my soaps.

rating 5.0. Good stuff! Smells great. A coupleof tablespoons of water on a damp brush to shave my entire face. Very little odor, which as a healthcare pro, is important. The full fat lanolin leaves my face smooth and clean. Blends with a pea sise dollop of cream for the best of both worlds. Worth the price up front....ends up less expensive that buying cans.

rating 5.0. The Legend. The legendary soap. MWF. Nuff said.  Best part is the conditioning after the shave. No need for aftershaves or moisturizers, just a nice clean rinse. Smell is pleasant as well. Sort of a light laundry detergent smell. No lingering with post shave scents.
rating 5.0. It's MWF. Nice clean soap smell. Very slick lather.
rating 5.0. Why did they invent canned foam Excellent shaving soap. No problems lathering. Extremely slick. Not really sure why you can only find shave foam in pressure cans in the stores.

rating 5.0. Great shaving soap When I switched to a safety razor a year ago, I was using the soap from target.  After doing a little reading, I decided to try Mitchell's Wool Fat.  I love it.  I use hot water and a boar brush, and I get great lather and a very enjoyable shave.

rating 5.0. Best overall shave soap This is one of the best shave soaps I've ever used.  It lathers well even in my hard water and provides an excellent cushion for shaving.  It leaves your face hydrated but not oily and improves the skin texture.

rating 5.0. THE GOLD STANDARD IN SHAVING SOAPS You rarely hear this product called by its full name. In shaving circles it's known simply as "MWF" and may be the most widely used product in shavingdom. For good reason-its primary ingredient 'tallow' is the basis of great shaving soaps worldwide. It has a nice, fresh soap smell. It treats your skin to a rich moisturizing experience like nothing else. If I try a shave soap that leaves me feeling less than fully protected, adding a few swirls of MWF assures a great shave.

rating 5.0. Nice shave soap. Well I decided to try this shave soap based on the reviews and I must say that I am not disappointed. It has a very pleasant scent, reminds me of the old time barber shops actually. It does also leave my face nice and smooth and lathers up nicely. It actually lathered up faster than my previous brand. That seemed to dry out my skin and it felt very tight after shaving. I will be using this soap for quite awhile. I have one other one that I want to try, but I think I found a favorite.

rating 5.0. Very slick and easy to get good lather Awsome lather.  Very slick and easy to get good lather. Smells nice too!  I have used many shave gels, foams, bars, creams and this has been the best.

rating 5.0. Glad I purchased I've read on some shaving blogs that MWF has like a cult following. I don't belong to any cults(haha) but love this soap. Some say it's a little hard to lather but DE shaving is all about patience and enjoyment. I usually let the soap soften in a little hot water in the bowl while I shower so it's ready when I comes out. I use different brushes and get very good lather with all of them except some types take a little more work. I find the shave to be smooth, cushioned and close. Don't hesitate and just buy, you will enjoy and be glad you purchased.

rating 5.0. Try this and it will be your "Go To" shaving cream. Awesome product, that is why it has been around so long. It is my daily shaving cream. It takes some practice to get a great lather from it.

rating 5.0. Wool Fat I switched to wet shaving with shaving soap at the beginning of the year and have tried three or four other shaving soaps. I would have to say this is one of the best soaps I have found. I live in an area that has naturally soft water, Denver Colorado, so it lathers really well.
This soap provides the comfort and the lubrication to get a really close shave.
Others that I have tried have been D Harris, Col Conks, Geo Thumper, and Edwin Jagger. GFT and DH are probably the same soap works the same, CC only lasts me about 3-4 weeks. EJ needs a lot of water to create a lather.
I will continue to try other soaps but I believe that MWF will be my #1 go to soap!

rating 5.0. Try it! So far so good it was my first shave soap for the new adventures of DE shaving. It smells clean and manly like a lotion of sorts. Leaves the face feeling pretty moisturized after a scrape. I would definitely recommend looking at Sharpologist instructions on the best way to lather this stuff it can be trickier from what I have experienced and read. It can take more water than some but I wouldn't push it too far or it wont reach maximum slickness. I now regret not getting the ceramic container it comes in, it looks cool, I now just use a small pyrex.
rating 5.0. Great smell Lovely soap, bought it for my husband, he likes shaving more now and he smells great!

rating 4.0. some soaps its fine, others are not so apparently I'm one of those people that has difficulty lathering it up correctly. I do have hard water but with a softener...some soaps its fine, others are not. i definitely have to work for this one! I've only been using it for a few days now, with an EJ DB89 and Polisilver Super iridium blades, and its a nice shave. I'll have to try it with some other blades too...I occasionally swap between Astra and Feathers as well.
Using this setup the razor does glide nicely. I'm mixed on the scent however... its soapy, which I don't mind, but tends to linger longer than I like. I do prefer it to other scents like bay rum and sandalwood... they are too 'old man'-ish for my tastes, even though they are a favorite with others. If you're used to those and not a soapy/clean scent, this might not be to your liking. Lastly, I have a feeling this puck is going to last a VERY long time! I'll give it a few more weeks before deciding if it'll have a permanent place in my rotation but so far I think its a yes.

rating 5.0. MWF is WTF good two words

Its good

scent is alright, but man great lather on my badger brush, and the glide this stuff has is pretty nice.

makes my skin feel amazing, and really helps reduce nicks and cuts.

rating 4.0. great soap but pricey I've used wool fat shaving soap for years and what I like about it is how nice it leaves my skin for the rest of the day. You have to work to get a lather going, and a boar brush works better than a badger but I like boar better anyways. So it's stir, add a little water, stir, more water, repeat until you get the lather you want. I sometimes find wool fat shaving soap for a cheaper price than Mitchel's but this is a good value. However, it is a little too large to fit in the bottom of a typical Old Spice shaving mug, so I found a bigger shaving mug. Maybe it's just more for the money, so I'm OK with it. Some people are allergic to wool fat (lanolin), so beware. It's also a very hard soap, so it lasts. For me, it gives a nice shave and leaves my skin baby soft for the day.

Waddie

rating 5.0. Better and Longer Lasting Than Shaving Gel or Foam Been using this shaving soap with my double edge safety razor for years.  Stopped using the Mach 3 and gel when it became too irritating to my skin.  This soap and my safety razor have been the perfect solution.  Very easy on my skin and better shave than ever before.  Highly recommended.  I just soak my shaving brush in an old coffee cup full of very hot water for about a minute, squeeze most the water out of the brush, then lather the brush on the soap disk for 30 seconds.  Then, I finish making the lather in the now empty cup.  Works very well and makes way more lather than I need every time.  Lasts several months.  Smells good too.
rating 3.0. it takes some work to get a good lather. It takes more work than is like to get a good lather. Once you do, its great. the smell is decent.

rating 5.0. Amazing but a little thin This is soap is absolutely fantastic! It is by far the best performing shave soap that I have used thus far. My only "complaints" would be that the pick was a bit thinner than I expected. Other than that, I have nothing but rave reviews for this product.
rating 5.0. This is great stuff. I would buy it again This is great stuff.  I would buy it again.  It compares to the rest of my shaving stuff on top and I have a lot of it.  MC

rating 5.0. THE Standard in premium shaving I've tried at least a dozen shave soaps, maybe two dozen. MWF is my go-to, standard. I leave it in a shave bowl in a drawer. I rinse my brush and then swirl the dripping wet brush on top of the soap. In about 20 seconds, you have phenomenal lather. Wet and repeat for more water if needed. Lather around your face further as needed. I often do this, then take a shower and repeat the lathering when I get out of the shower, and then shave.

I have found a few artisan soaps that lather as good, but none better. Those artisan soaps often come in a variety of delightful fragrances, but I don't care that much about fragrance. MWF doesn't have much of any fragrance. In fact after having wet it and let it dry a few dozen times, there is no discernible scent of any kind. If you like the smell of MWF (or any other shave soap), keep it in a covered container between uses. I'd suggest for those who like fragrance in their shave soap to just put MWF in a covered container and sprinkle in a little of their favorite cologne a few times and keep it covered and you'll have a $40 artisanal shave soap!

I like the ingredients. It's tallow based which I prefer. There's lanolin in it which I like. Although it's not a glycerin based soap, there is a little glycerin in the ingredients - it doesn't seem to be a large amount, so if you really like glycerin, get some vegetable glycerin on Amazon and sprinkle it on top of the soap or add it to your pre-shave. It doesn't have shea butter in it, so I sometimes keep an open puck of shea butter shave soap in a shave dish next to MWF and occasionally reach down with my brush and lather from both.

I've seen some reviews that say that it doesn't lather all that well in "hard" water. We have moderately hard water in my city and I've never had trouble at all.

Finally, it's cheap! I lather before showering; after showering, and usually a second time while shaving, and my brush is full of lather when I finish and my single puck will last for maybe 300 shaves?? so maybe 4 cents a shave??

Also,

rating 5.0. This has to be one of the best shave soaps out there This has to be one of the best shave soaps out there.  I have been wet shaving for about 2 years.  This soap lathers up very well for me, even though I have hard water.  Shave is smooth and scent is pleasant.
rating 5.0. good shaving soap good texture and smooth application, as well as good scent.  i'd recommend this if you like having with soap based products
rating 5.0. Five Stars Great DE shaving soap, would recommend to anyone.  Fragrance is light, lathers very well.

rating 5.0. this is not hard to lather you just dont know how yet;) this is a great soap. infact the best one I've ever tried. The only ones that even compares to it are the homemade soaps my wife made (100% organic and omg wonderful) but unless you want to spend a few days making soap buy this one. if you are allergic to wool then dont play with this one.

Pros: feels great, nice light smell, real nice non slip shave, you get to say wool fat allot. i find this pairs well with a Feather blade in my DE razor

Cons: a little expensive but should last you about six months; takes experience to get a good lather, your skin might not react well to lanolin

Ok so for the lather... when it first got this soap my fore arm was getting huge from trying to work a perfect lather. Hopefully it can save you some trial and error. You don’t need to face lather. Soak the puck and your brush in warm to hot water (hard or soft), take shower, and dump out water from soap. One shake of the brush and then work the puck gently. Now transfer the froth into a separate bowl and work it until it peaks. Should take less than two minutes. I do this with a silvertip brush no problem at all. you don’t need to be an expert barber to work a good lather.

Soak the puck, drain the puck, and play with the amount of water and soap you use until you figure it out. If it took you too long to get a perfect almost whipped cream lather, adjust your technique.

rating 1.0. It also had a really bad lather. Please do not buy this soap This soap gave me skin irritation on my neck and burned for hours. It also had a really bad lather. rating 5.0. Great Shaving Soap Very nice scent... Mild and refreshing. It lathers very well, yet it does not "disolve" quickly. My husband loves it.

rating 5.0. The best shaving soap I have ever used I have found the holy grail! The best shaving soap I have ever used, bar none.  Lather works up quickly and perfect every time.  Lubrication must be experienced to believe, simply incredible.  Fragrance is mild but good.  Huge cake of soap, will probably last 6 months.

rating 5.0. Probably the Absolute Best I keep MWF on hand,always! It delivers a foamy slick surface that my razor just glides over. It works well with any aftershave, there is not any conflict with the scents that I alternate using. Plus I enjoy the canister that my original order came in. Great shave soap.

rating 5.0. You'll Never Go Back I tried everything before this and I will never switch back. This stuff lather's really thick and really fast, is really smooth, makes the razor glide better, washes off easily, and leaves my skin feeling great. Basically this is the 5-star gold standard in shaving soap. I used to use both the pre-shave oil and soap and I stopped using the oil because this stuff alone was way better than any combination I had used before.

I could go on and on for hours about how great this stuff is, if it weren't shaving soap. That said, I wish everything I bought online was this amazing.

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. A must-have for any wet shaver! Right out of the gate, Mitchell's Wool Fat is an amazing shaving soap!  It lathers up well (not any trickier than other tallow-based soaps), clean/mild scent (a classic Ivory/bar soap type smell), protective & very slick!  The slickness is definitely one of my favorite attributes of MWF.  Tallow soaps are generally known for their glide, but the addition of the lanolin in Mitchell's takes it to another level.  The post-shave feel with this soap is hands down the best I've experienced.  Some of my other products are certainly going to sit around now that MWF is in the picture.  Do yourself a favor & add this to your wet shaving stash asap; you won't be disappointed!

input:
rating 5.0. Secure, Cute, Extras Just received this today and I love it more than I thought I would.
It would be great for makeup, but I got it to keep my vitamin supplements in to keep them secure.
The material is high quality, the combo lock is quick and easy to use and more secure as you slide the button when your combo is in. It doesn't just pop open if your combo happens to be turned past (if that makes sense). The zipper clicks into the lock so that's how the lock works on the bag at least.
It also comes with the two little makeup bags in it, which I didn't expect. They have little snaps on them so you can take them out and put them in when you'd like.
Overall high quality, cute, simple to operate, and better quality than expected.
If this helped, click that helpful button please!

rating 5.0. Sturdy and secure Love this case. It comes with two zipper pouches inside and mesh pockets. Locking part works great and feels secure. I use it to carry medications in my purse to they stay locked and safe. Fits 2-3 reg size prescription bottles per pouch. Decent size. Would absolutely recommend.

rating 5.0. Cute multifunctional make up bag for an awesome price I'd been looking for a good makeup bag/ organizer. I want one that's small enough to throw in my purse, but big enough to hold my needed cosmetics. I can't stand make up bags that are just one large compartment, cuz I'm always searching and searching through it for what I need. What I need always is at the bottom too. So annoying. This bag couldn't be more perfect. The size is a little bigger than an average blow dryer, it has a couple removable pouches insides, one side zipper compartment, and the other side holds brushes securely. The price you can't beat either. I love black and white stripes... Perfect bag. Now the only thing left is to see how long it'll hold up for.

rating 5.0. Perfect size for storing feminine products at work! I was getting sick of finding that my feminine products supply was running low because other people at work were taking from my bag - but I also didn't want to have to carry a bag with me to the bathroom every time I need to go while on my period. I decided to buy two of these so that I could store one in each of our work bathrooms (so that I don't have to wait for the "specific bathroom" that has all my supplies - now both do!).

Each bag has enough room for storage for every feminine product possible - I fit 4 extra thick pads, a dozen tampons, about 20 liners and at least a dozen "slim" pads. It's pretty full, but there is still more room to spare - I just preferred to not have it bulging, for easier zip/close. And that's what fits in just ONE bag! Soooo looking forward to keeping my supply stocked longer, with no one else taking from my bags anymore! Thanks, Vaultz!

rating 5.0.
